Neemba Sénégal, une équipe de 300 personnes, à votre service.

Name: Mardon Recycling Machinery Ltd
Description:
We are an independent family owned business that was established in 2003, and have since grown into one of the major suppliers of waste handling equipment in the UK. Mardon is an ISO 9001 and ISO 14001 accredited company with a good reputation within the recycling and waste disposal industry.

Our machinery is CE marked and comes with a full warranty and conforms to the highest international standards. All RAMPACK equipment may be purchased outright, but we are able to offer various financial options from Lease purchase, Lease hire to our own contract rental scheme. Whatever the client’s needs, we are able to find an option that suits. All our prices include delivery, installation and full on-site certified training.

Our team of fully qualified service engineers can offer a full range of training, repair, parts and servicing anywhere throughout the UK and abroad. We have the knowledge and skill to repair all types and brands of waste handling equipment. We can offer a variety of service packages to suit all client requirements. We are able to provide all the necessary health and safety paperwork i.e.: risk assessments and method statements prior to our arrival on site.

Mardon is proud to list the following companies amongst some of our most valued clients: DHL, Unipart, Greene King, Royal Mail, Nestle, Heinz , Twinings, British Airways, Tetley GB, Metropolitan Police and the BBC.

Name: Triama Norte
Description:
Em 1996, Gilberto Gualter juntamente com seu pai Francisco Gualter buscam novos mercados e inauguram lojas no norte de Minas Gerais, a primeira loja foi inaugurada na cidade de Montes Claros, posteriormente em Janaúba, com o mesmo propósito, levar tecnologia ao homem do campo. Com o passar dos anos, a empresa adquiriu concessões em outras cidades e passou a atuar na Chapada Gaúcha – MG e também no sudoeste Baiano, lojas em Guanambi e Vitória da Conquista. O Grupo Triama faz questão de sempre divulgar por todos os cantos do Brasil o potencial do Norte de Minas e o valor das pessoas desta região.

No agronegócio, são décadas de credibilidade na comercialização de Tratores Novos e Seminovos, Maquinas da linha amarela e Implementos Agrícolas que atende as mais variadas atividades rurais, industriais, mineração e construção civil, assistência técnica especializada, comercialização de peças originais XCMG, Yanmar  e toda a linha de produtos STIHL. 
 
O crescimento contínuo e a diversidade nas ações exige o apoio e a integração de toda a equipe e parceiros que fazem a força do Grupo Triama.

Varias conquistas ao longo dos tempos nos colocaram em posições estremamente relevantes para o setor AgroIndustrial.

Com isso nos tornamos referencia na comercialização de bens Agricolas, da Construção Civil, Mineração e da linha de Jardinagens.

Name: TEMMA
Description:
Nous automatisons vos lignes d'embouteillage / de conditionnement !


TECHNIQUE EMBALLAGE ET DE MAINTENANCE (TEMMA), votre spécialiste technique dans le domaine de l'emballage, du conditionnement et de la maintenance.


Depuis 30 ans l'entreprise TEMMA, étudie, conçoit et réalise l'automatisation de lignes d'embouteillage depuis la fourniture jusqu'à l'installation de machines et convoyeurs, sur le secteur de l'alimentaire et surtout de la boisson.


Les solutions de conditionnement que nous proposons sont modulaires et évolutives.


Matériels neufs et d'occasion, conseil et maintenance, TEMMA vous offre son savoir-faire sur les plus grandes marques du secteur aux meilleures conditions. 
Nous nous adaptons aux problématiques, contraintes et envies de chaque client. Avec TEMMA vous trouvez un partenaire technique fiable et réactif, à taille humaine, à la pointe des questions d'optimisations de vos circuits de logistique.


Les secteurs d’activité sur lesquels nous intervenons :
➼ L'emballage,
➼ L'embouteillage,
➼ Le conditionnement en général.


TEMMA, PME implantée dans le sud-ouest intervient sur toute la France.

Nous proposons une gamme complète de produits dédiés aux professionnels et collectivités : pelles hydrauliques, chargeuses sur pneus, tombereaux articulés, compacteurs, pipelayers et équipements de démolition.  
 
 Nous couvrons 20 départements de la Loire-Atlantique à la frontière Suisse en s’appuyant sur un réseau de 10 sites afin d’être au plus près de nos clients et assurer un service de qualité.

Name: CONMACH SOLUTION
Description:
CONMACH SOLUTION is established in 2022 .
At CONMACH SOLUTION, we offer a wide range of construction machinery products including lifting and handling equipment, concrete batching plants, concrete pumps, transit mixers  and other construction equipment. We work with some of the leading manufacturers in the industry to ensure that we provide our customers with the best quality products.

We understand that construction projects require reliable and efficient equipment to ensure timely completion and our team of experts is always ready to provide assistance in selecting the right equipment for your project. We offer after-sales support to our customers ensuring that their equipment is well maintained and serviced to minimize downtime.

Our vision is to become the most reliable and efficient partner in construction solutions and contribute to the growth of the construction industry. We are committed to customer satisfaction and ensure to fulfill their requirements in a timely and professional manner.

At CONMACH SOLUTION, we believe that our success is based on the satisfaction of our customers and we strive to exceed their expectations by providing quality products, efficient services, and excellent customer support.

Name: Investkonsult Sweden AB
Description:
Investkonsult Sweden AB, is a small, family-owned and Swedish based company, operating worldwide. Since 1976 we have gone from traders of conventional second hand textile machinery to professional consultants with a strong focus in the nonwoven and hygiene industries.

We are one of the few companies in the world solely specialized in these two fields. This means we can focus on the nonwoven and hygiene sectors only - developing extensive knowledge in these sectors.

We are serving these industries with:
- objective valuations for insurance purposes, bankruptcies, sales and intra-company transfers
- consultancy work for already existing producers
- market studies and recommended set-ups for new ventures
- dismantling, packing, loading and shipping of machinery

We value building and maintaining close relationships with our customers, always with a high degree of discretion and confidentiality. Our clients include most of the nonwoven and personal care producers worldwide.

With our unique combination of consulting and knowledge of machines and production lines there is no need to involve any other company. We can be your dependable partner in all your concerns.

Name: ALHAZM Est. for Industrial Equipment
Description:
ALHAZM Est. for Industrial Equipment was founded in 1978 at 10th Street, Dammam, KSA by Mr. Waleed Khalid Aldulaijan. It was a hand tool shop at the beginning and was striving to reach a leading position in the industrial equipment market. With the effort of the founder and ALHAZM team soon it became a market leader in the industrial equipment and many best European, American and East Asian manufacturing companies became partner with us.
Due to our market reputation many well known companies from different sectors e.g. Oil & gas, Construction, Automotive and Manufacturing sectors in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia are our clients.

Now, ALHAZM has expanded the range of products to cover Hand tools, Power tools, Air compressors, Welding Equipments, Automotive equipments, Lubrication Equipment Power generators, Construction equipment, Cleaning equipments. As a result of this expansion ALHAZM has established its first subsidiary ALHAZM machinery which offers Machine shops, Sheet metal machines, Wood working machines and Aluminum machines. We also have introduced well equipped workshop and experienced technicians with spare parts division. This facility also offers our customers an after-sales services.

Name: KONTECH Ltd.
Description:
KONTECH Ltd. is a specialized distributor of plate heat exchangers and pumps for HVAC and industrial applications, serving projects across Europe, including Bulgaria, Romania, Greece, and Cyprus, as well as other EU markets.

We supply brazed plate heat exchangers, gasketed plate heat exchangers, and free flow plate heat exchangers, offering engineered heat transfer solutions designed for reliable operation, optimized thermal performance, and long service life. Our portfolio covers applications in HVAC systems, district heating, industrial processes, and energy-efficient building services.

We supply SonFlow plate heat exchangers, developed and manufactured in Denmark, designed for compact installation, consistent quality, and stable performance.

Our approach is engineering-driven. Each heat exchanger is selected based on the operating parameters provided, including temperatures, flow rates, pressure drop, and application-specific requirements. This ensures correct sizing and predictable operation under real operating conditions.

We support installers, designers, system integrators, and industrial clients with:
- Brazed, Gasketed, and Free Flow plate heat exchangers for HVAC and industry
- Solutions for standard duties and challenging fluids with fouling risk
- Quotation preparation based on complete input data
- Reliable availability of spare parts for gasketed models

When searching for brazed plate heat exchangers, plate heat exchangers, HVAC heat exchangers, or industrial heat transfer solutions, KONTECH is a reliable point of contact.

Description:

El objetivo inicial era la industria de la pasta y el papel, pero pronto se desarrolló hacia la energía de combustibles sólidos así como la recuperación de energía residual para su reutilización.

Los socios de la empresa tienen más de 40 años de experiencia demostrada en soluciones / optimizaciones energéticas industriales. Nuestra política es representar y/o distribuir soluciones y productos de las mejores tecnologías existentes, de empresas de experiencias demostradas y/o con tecnologías innovadoras.

Con origen escandinavo, con presencia en Suecia a través de nuestra empresa hermana, es natural que la mayoría de las tecnologías sean de Suecia y de Finlandia, asimismo representamos tecnologías reconocidas del centro de Europa o América.

Las empresas representadas tienen mucho peso en la industria de proceso como en la energía en base de la biomasa y otros combustibles.

Lo fundamental ha sido siempre el conocimiento técnico de los productos suministrados y de garantizar el seguimiento de los resultados, asegurando que SOTGAR Systems a través de nuestras representadas siempre se preocupa en el buen funcionamiento de las instalaciones suministradas a nuestros clientes.

La mayor parte de las tecnologías son procesos y sistemas, plantas de producir energía, calderas, sistemas de recuperar energía residual para convertirlo en energía eléctrica o de calor útil y el manejo de combustibles sólidos.

También hay componentes, tal como intercambiadores de calor, mediciones de alta tecnología, refinos, cadenas etc.
Ofertamos la solución OEE probablemente la más completa, eficaz, fácil de utilizar como de entender en el mercado, compatible con casi cualquier instalación informática, además de una sólida reputación dentro de sus muchos usuarios repetitivos.

Name: KAGERER Industrial Supply (Industriefachhandel GmbH)
Description:
Production and assembly managers in mid-sized companies are under growing pressure:
improve efficiency, reduce costs and keep operations stable –
often without clear transparency on where to start.

KAGERER provides that clarity.

 Our focus: automated supply of consumables (C-items)
 Our lever: intelligent dispensing systems with automatic replenishment

C-items usually account for only a small share of total material costs,
but cause a significant part of procurement and administrative effort.
This is where efficiency and cost-saving potential often remains untapped,
because consumption, availability and internal logistics are difficult to measure.

With our automated C-item supply, we make these potentials visible
– without major investments in robots or complex production systems.

Concrete benefits in daily operations:

 Reduced material consumption through transparency and data-based decisions

 Lower personnel effort thanks to automated dispensing

 Shorter walking distances through decentralized dispensing points

 24/7 availability through continuous monitoring and smart control

This creates a highly underestimated efficiency lever,
especially for mid-sized companies competing with larger,
often lower-cost international players.

KAGERER not only provides the systems, but also
takes care of forecasting, replenishment and ongoing operation – reliably in the background.

 Check the efficiency potential
of your production or assembly operations – without obligation.

Additionally:
For over 60 years, we have supplied consumables for daily operations
to manufacturing, assembly and service-oriented companies –
from welding technology and tools to personal protective equipment.

 All products are also available via the KAGERER Online Shop: https://kagerer-shop.de/

Name: Munsterman BV
Description:
Munsterman BV is a company founded in 1960. At that time, the main focus was on importing Massey Ferguson tractors into the Netherlands, which eventually led to the dealership of Ford tractors. Today, our agricultural division remains one of the main pillars of our company, with dealerships for New Holland, JCB, and Kuhn.

In the 1990s, we also developed a wholesale business for forklifts in the eastern Netherlands, which led to our current dealership of Toyota Material Handling. Through this partnership, we offer a comprehensive range of Toyota forklifts and warehouse equipment, including the premium BT line, renowned for quality and reliability.

In 2005, responding to market demand, we started our rental activities for access equipment, beginning with a few scissor lifts and expanding today to a fleet that meets nearly all customer needs. To maintain the high level of service and parts support our customers expect, we cooperate closely with Haulotte Netherlands.

Recently, we have expanded our activities to include cleaning equipment from Nilfisk, allowing us to offer the same high-quality standards as our other brands. In our garden division, we supply machines from Honda, Husqvarna, and BGU.

Munsterman BV remains a family-owned company, which ensures traditional values in service, quality, and pricing. Our current dealership of Toyota Material Handling highlights our ongoing commitment to providing top-quality solutions in forklift and warehouse technology.

All of our machines are manufactured to the latest machinery directives and are CE Certified.

All sales, post-sales, and customer service are based in Warwickshire.  We stock machines spares but all machines are built with common components readily available from industrial supply outlets around the UK and the world.

Although we offer a wide variety of standard presses, any of our presses can be customised to suit your specified needs and also integrated into manufacturing systems.

As a premier distributor of top quality European Metalworking Machinery Brands such as RHTC Hydraulic Presses, Merkle Welding Devices, Scantool Metalworking Machinery, and GYS Welding Equipment, our team is made up of industry professionals who have worked with metalworking machinery and can properly advise you on what machine is suitable for your needs, requirements, and applications.

Backed by recognized expertise and an international network of first-rate partners, our company provides its customers with equipment and services designed to optimize their performance in a constantly evolving sector.

Our offer is structured around four complementary areas:

1. Consulting : 
We support our customers in the implementation of new investment projects, continuous process improvement, technology watch and technical expertise.

2. Equipment distribution : 
We offer a wide range of equipment and components covering all steps in textile production:
•	Knitting, dyeing, finishing, garment making
•	Automation, central vacuum
•	Control and measuring equipment
•	Lubricants, tools and technical supplies

3. After-sales service : 
We supply spare parts to ensure the responsiveness and longevity of our customers' installations.

4. Sales representation for spinning :
We market a selection of unbleached, colored, natural, synthetic and technical yarns, satisfying the high demands of the textile industry.

Our added value is based on a network of solid partners, recognized for their know-how and capacity for innovation, located mainly in Italy, Germany, Great Britain, Spain, Turkey and Korea.

Name: Getra Oy
Description:
Getra Oy tarjoaa ratkaisuja, jotka varmistavat asiakkaidemme tuotantoprosessien sujuvuuden, tehokkuuden ja laadun. Ymmärrämme asiakkaidemme tarpeet ja tarjoamme räätälöityjä merkintäratkaisuja, jotka auttavat optimoimaan tuotannon ja varmistamaan liiketoiminnan menestyksen.

Valikoimastamme löydät laadukkaat ja toimintavarmat teolliset merkintälaitteet markkinoiden johtavilta valmistajilta: Videojet, FOBA, VWS ja Anser. Nämä teknologiat kattavat laajan valikoiman merkintä- ja punnitusratkaisuja:
	• CIJ (jatkuvakiertoinen mustesuihkutulostus)
	• TIJ (lämpömustesuihkutulostus)
	• Lasermerkintä
	• TTO (kalvomerkintä)
	• Etiketöinti ja punnitus integroiduilla ratkaisuilla
Tarjoamillamme huipputeknologisilla ja automatisoiduilla ratkaisuilla, joilla on lukuisia patentteja, varmistat tuotantosi tehokkuuden ja laadun.

Tarjoamme myös MaaS-palvelua (merkintä palveluna). MaaS-palvelun avulla asiakkaamme saavat käyttöönsä merkintäratkaisun, sisältäen laitteen, asennuksen ja huollon, kiinteällä kuukausimaksulla. Palvelun sisältö ja hinta räätälöidään asiakkaan tarpeiden ja valitun laitteen mukaan.

Kumppanuus asiakkaidemme kanssa on toimintamme ydin. Olemme toimineet monien kanssa alusta asti, tukien heidän kasvuaan ja kehitystään. Asiakkaamme arvostavat erityisesti joustavaa palveluamme, tuotantoprosessien optimointia ja nopeaa reagointia muutoksiin. Tarjoamme kokonaisvaltaista palvelua, joka sisältää laitevalmistajiemme asiantuntemuksen, jatkuvan tuen ja koko maan kattavan huolto-organisaation. Näin varmistamme, että tuotantoprosessisi pysyvät toimintavarmoina ja kilpailukykyisinä.
Getra on kumppanisi, kun tarvitset luotettavia ja tehokkaita merkintäratkaisuja tuotantosi tarpeisiin. Ota yhteyttä – autamme mielellämme kehittämään tuotantoasi entistä kilpailukykyisemmäksi.

Name: Hydromec inc.
Description:
Hydromec inc., distributor of Ponsse, Hyundai Construction, Landrich and Eltec equipment, is also recognized as the largest regional specialist in mobile hydraulics. The company has experienced accelerated growth since 2011. With two service points in Saguenay-Lac-Saint-Jean (Chicoutimi and Dolbeau), Hydromec is currently one of the best positioned companies to take full advantage of the recovery of the forestry industry. 

A forester's best friend
Hydromec’s priority is to offer the best possible service to a growing customer base. This approach has a positive and direct impact on sales of new and reconditioned forestry equipment, which are increasing sharply. Jean Trottier is very proud to point out that the company has been the exclusive distributor, since 2005, of the products of the renowned Finnish manufacturer Ponsse for all of Quebec and has received the mention of the best Ponsse distributor in the world twice, in 2007 and in 2014 !

Partner with the best equipment manufacturers on the planet
The Hydromec-Ponsse partnership is a success for both organizations, since it has allowed the European manufacturer to firmly establish itself on the market, as the current leader of the forestry industry in Quebec.

A family tradition of excellence
Hydromec, a family business founded by Marcel Trottier in 1975, comes from a solid tradition of customer service that dates back more than 160 years. The Trottier family of Dolbeau-Mistassini now sees the sixth generation of these enthusiasts of mechanics and hydraulics involved.

With nearly 75 employees and soon a fourth service point: Dolbeau-Mistassini, Chicoutimi, Amos and Saint-Augustin-de-Desmaures, Hydromec has today become the strongest regional company in the mobile hydraulic field, and soon a player in leading provincial level for the sale and service of mobile equipment.

With over 5 years of liquid experience in the landscaping and snow industry we bring a wealth of knowledge to the table. Count on us to guide you through the process, from choosing the right equipment to sharing valuable insights on liquid de-icing best practices.

Discover the power of Storm Solutions Plus and join our growing community of satisfied clients and experience the difference that advanced storm management and high-quality snow plows can make for your business.

Vi tror på att göra människor glada!

Vi lever efter filosofin att en relation mellan kund och leverantör börjar på allvar den dag maskinen tas i bruk . Name: A.E. Maskiner ApS
Description:
Hos A.E. Maskiner er kvalitet og fleksibilitet kerneværdier. Det går vi aldrig på kompromis med. 

 Da Anders Ebbesen for 11 år siden grundlagde virksomheden, var det som et mindre entreprenørfirma. Hurtigt stod det dog klart, at der var stor efterspørgsel på god, professionel service og vedligehold af maskiner, og virksomhedens nye kurs blev sat. 

11 år senere er A.E. Maskiner fortsat i høj vækst. Nu med 50 specialiserede medarbejdere, 18 veludstyret servicevogne og 2 fuldt udrustet lastbiler på landevejen, hver dag. Vi investerer løbende i det nyeste testudstyr, så alle teknikere er bedst muligt forberedt på opgaven.

Høj medarbejdertilfredshed er et nøgleord for os, så derfor arbejder vi hårdt på at skabe en arbejdsplads med fokus social og faglig udvikling.  Vi videreuddanner løbende, så vi hele tiden har fagligheden i orden. 

Vi holder til i et flot, 5.000 kvm. stort, præsentabelt domicil i Randers ud til den østjyske motorvej. 

Virksomhedens filosofi er, at tilbyde skræddersyede løsninger, mennesker handler med mennesker og vi ønsker at indgå værdiskabende partnerskaber med vores kunder.

Name: Diedron Swiss GmbH
Description:
Welcome to Diedron Swiss GmbH, your expert in coolant filtration systems and the official representative of Diedron's innovative technologies!

As part of the Diedron Group based in Italy, we provide advanced filtration solutions that ensure maximum efficiency and quality in industrial production processes. With over 22 years of experience and cutting-edge technology, we offer tailored solutions for companies looking to optimize their machinery and manufacturing workflows.

Our state-of-the-art KSS filtration systems enable filtration down to a low pressure of 3µm, ensuring optimal purification of the coolant (KSS). This technology extends machine life and enhances productivity. Thanks to their modular design, our systems can be configured to meet a variety of needs, including magnetic separators, belt filters, heat exchangers, and cooling systems.

With flexible connection options – either in bypass mode or via a separate tank – our systems integrate seamlessly into existing production processes, guaranteeing continuous and reliable filtration.

At Diedron Swiss GmbH, quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction are at the heart of everything we do. Our dedicated team is here to support you in selecting and implementing the perfect filtration solution for your specific requirements.

Follow us to stay updated on the latest developments in industrial filtration technology. We look forward to working with you to enhance the efficiency and performance of your manufacturing processes!

A tous les industriels désireux de :

-	Améliorer la sécurité de vos environnements de travail 
-	Maximiser l'efficacité de production
-	Garantir la protection du personnel
-	Optimiser l’espace 

Pensez-vous à régulièrement ajuster vos politiques de sécurité ?

Les statistiques révèlent un nombre considérable d'accidents au sein des entreprises, avec environ 200 000 accidents de travail recensés chaque année par l’INRS.

Qui sommes-nous ?

BMI Axelent, le leader européen situé à Saint-Romain-de-Colbosc, en Normandie, spécialisé dans la conception, la fabrication et la commercialisation de systèmes de panneaux pour les applications d’environnement machines et de stockage. Nous nous engageons, depuis maintenant 30 ans , à vous fournir des solutions complètes et flexibles afin d'assurer une sécurité maximale pour vos biens et votre personnel en milieu industriel.

 Servant les secteurs industriels, logistiques et du bâtiment, BMI Axelent s'engage à fournir des produits de qualité supérieure, conformes aux normes de l'UE et adaptés aux besoins spécifiques de chaque application.

Souhaitant satisfaire ses clients, BMI Axelent offre un package sécurité, garantissant les meilleures solutions possibles. Elle a développé ses compétences afin de couvrir trois activités :
-	X-Guard : Cloisons grillagées pour la protection des machines
-	X-Protect : Protections à l’impact à mémoire de forme
-	X-Wall : Solutions pour cloisons modulaires et de stockage
-	X-Secure : Accessoires de sécurité incluant marquage, signalisation et protection acier

La réactivité est au cœur de l'approche de BMI Axelent : Une réactivité qui ne se limite pas à la fabrication et à la livraison de vos panneaux, mais qui est associée aux notions de service, de savoir-faire et d’innovation. 

  Notre site web : www.bmi-axelent.com/ 
 Vous avez un projet ? Vous avez besoin de plus d’informations ? Contactez-nous -> info@bmi-axelent.com ou au  02 35 13 15 20

Vincent Tractors & Plant was started by husband and wife team Ken and Esme Vincent in a tiny workshop in Summercourt, Cornwall and moved to its current home in Fraddon in 1966, where it has continued to thrive and grow beyond the county.

Ken and Esme’s son Paul is now at the helm of the company, and has made Vincent Tractors & Plant the premier supplier of the newest technology in agriculture, construction and ground-care across Cornwall, Devon and Somerset. They are also dedicated to providing a great customer experience, making sure that staff receive quality industry training so that you receive a fast, friendly and efficient service from all of their departments.

Whether you’re a farmer, plant operator, groundsman, landowner or a gardener, don't hesitate to ring and talk to one of their team members: 01726 211606.

Steuber ist seit mehr als 100 Jahren anerkannter Partner der Druck- und Medienindustrie. Steuber-Kunden profitieren von umfassenden Supportleistungen, intelligenten Konzepten und hochwertigen Produkten. Zum Selbstverständnis des Unternehmens gehört ein fast rund um die Uhr besetzter Service. Aus dem etwa 7.000 Produkte und mehr als 10.000 Serviceteile umfassenden Lager beliefert Steuber Druckbetriebe in ganz Deutschland. Der gut ausgebildete, hochqualifizierte Technikerstamm sichert hohe Wartungs- und Reparaturqualität. Das im Jahr 1922 gegründete Familienunternehmen wird heute in dritter Generation von Stephan Steuber geführt.

Description:

Name: Rock Equipment LTD
Description:
Welcome to Rock Equipment!

At Rock Equipment, we understand the value of reliable, high-quality machinery, and we recognize that sometimes used equipment can offer an excellent alternative to new purchases. Our mission is to bridge the gap between equipment owners looking to sell their assets and buyers seeking well-maintained, pre-owned machines. We carefully inspect and evaluate each piece of equipment, ensuring its quality and suitability for resale, so you can have confidence in your purchase.

We have developed a reliable network of sellers and buyers across the globe, enabling us to source and offer a diverse range of used crushing, screening, and material handling equipment. Our inventory includes jaw crushers, impact crushers, cone crushers, vibrating screens, conveyors, and more, from leading manufacturers in the industry. Whether you’re looking for a specific model or seeking cost-effective alternatives to meet your operational requirements, we strive to provide you with the best options available.

Whether you’re a buyer or seller, Rock Equipment is here to help your search through the used crushing, screening, and material handling equipment market. We invite you to explore our inventory, get in touch, and experience the Rock Equipment difference for yourself. Together, we can help you find the right equipment solutions to drive your success.

Reputation. Reliability. Repetition.

Name: BERNICO
Description:
BERNICO is a dynamic company specializing in the food processing machinery industry. Our simple organizational structure, supported by professionals from various fields, allows us to act quickly without unnecessary procedures, enabling efficient completion of specified tasks.
We offer comprehensive services, including purchase, sales, service and reconstruction of machines dedicated to food processing. Our specialization includes machines for the poultry, fish, and meat industries, as well as packaging industries. With many years of experience in the market, we supply machines from reputable brands such as Stork, CFS, Baader, Meyn, Marel, Scanvaegt, Ishida, Multivac, Tiromat, Geneglace, Systemate, Koppens, Magurit, Carnitech, Norfo, Kai Olsen, Fomaco, and many more.
We are always ready to partner with plants that have used food processing equipment for sale. We encourage you to familiarize yourself with our offer in depth, as well as to contact us if you have equipment used for disposal.

Name: Kronos Makina
Description:
Kronos Makina, 20 yıldan fazla bir süredir gıda sektöründe üretim, kalite sağlama, projelendirme, devreye alma, ürün/proje danışmanlık  konularında faaliyetlerde bulunmuş, deneyimli bir ekip tarafından yönetilmektedir.

Kronos Makina, gıda sektörüne yönelik makina temsilciliği ve distribütörlüğü alanında faaliyet göstermektedir. Misyonumuz, dünya çapında tanınan kaliteli ve yenilikçi gıda işleme ve paketleme makinelerini Türkiye pazarına sunarak, gıda üretim süreçlerinde verimliliği ve kaliteyi artırmaktır. Portföyümüzde, gıda işleme, paketleme ve kalite kontrol sistemleri gibi geniş bir ürün yelpazesi bulunmaktadır. 

Her bir müşteri ve proje için özel çözümler sunmayı amaçlayan Kronos Makina, sektördeki en yeni teknolojileri takip ederek, müşterilerinin ihtiyaçlarına en uygun, en yüksek standartlardaki makineleri sağlamak için çalışmaktadır. Güçlü tedarikçi ilişkilerimiz ve teknik bilgi birikimimiz ile müşterilerimize, projelendirme danışmanlık hizmetlerinden, devreye alma ve sonrası için destek ve bakım hizmetlerine kadar kapsamlı bir hizmet sunuyoruz.

Kronos Makina, sürdürülebilir ve verimli gıda üretim süreçlerine katkıda bulunmayı hedefleyerek, sektördeki müşterilerinin güvenini ve memnuniyetini en üst seviyede tutmayı amaçlamaktadır. Bu doğrultuda, firmamız, gıda sektörünün geleceğini şekillendirecek yenilikçi çözümler sunmaya devam edecektir.

kg-pharma AB

With cutting-edge technology, user-friendly operation, and advanced process control, we empower pharmaceutical teams around the globe to move from concept to market-ready product with confidence.

 Because every tablet matters.

Name: Qingdao Yuanquan Machinery Co, Ltd,
Description:
Qingdao Yuanquan Machinery Co, Ltd, Çin'de 30 yılı aşkın deneyime sahip, hayvan elyafı işleme makinelerinin profesyonel üreticisidir. Orijinal şirket, yirmi yıllık araştırma ve taraklama ekipmanı tekstili imalatının geliştirilmesinden sonra 1985 yılında kuruldu. Artık tüm makinelerimiz yalnızca koyun yünü, kaşmir için uygundur, aynı zamanda deve kılı, yak kılı, tavşan kılı, alpaka yünü ve diğer hayvan lifleri için de mükemmeldir.

 

Üretim süreçlerimiz, her türlü yünün özelliklerini geliştirmesini ve uygulama alanını genişletmesini mümkün kılan, uzun yıllara dayanan sürekli gelişim ve yeniliğin meyveleridir. Şu anda ürün kalitemiz, uluslararası birinci sınıf standardı elde ettikten sonra, iç ve dış pazarlarda da belirli bir tanınmışlık ve etki elde etmiştir. Moğolistan, Rusya, Afganistan, Tacikistan, Özbekistan, Türkmenistan, Kazakistan, Hindistan, Avustralya, İngiltere, Cezayir, Ürdün, Peru ve diğer bölgelerde birçok makineyi başarıyla kurduk.

 

Müşterilerimizle kazan-kazan iş ilişkisi kurmaya odaklanıyoruz ve yalnızca yüksek kalitemiz ve rekabetçi fiyatlarımızla değil, aynı zamanda profesyonel ekibimizin "gülümseme" hizmetiyle de büyük bir üne sahip oluyoruz. Ürünlerimizi geliştirmeye ve yenilemeye devam edeceğiz ve hem yeni hem de eski müşterilerimize en iyi hizmeti sunacağız. Ticari, ekonomik ve teknik işbirliğini ziyaret etmeniz ve müzakere etmeniz için saygılarımızla.

Mit langjähriger Erfahrung bieten wir zuverlässig Spitzenqualität, Präzision und kosteneffiziente Lösungen.

Name: DHS Equipment
Description:
Built on the unwavering integrity of Marine Corps service, DHS Equipment, founded by David Schatz in 2006, stands on the core values of Quality, Support, and Integrity. These founding principles continue to guide us today as we serve the construction industry.

We are an industry-leading e-commerce distributor, dedicated to providing high-quality OEM and aftermarket replacement parts for construction equipment. Our mission is to empower construction outfits of all sizes – from independent contractors to large enterprise customers and government agencies – by offering a comprehensive range of reliable parts and equipment from top manufacturers.

What sets DHS Equipment apart?

Quality Parts, Your Way: 
Choose from our extensive selection of genuine OEM parts or our high-performance aftermarket DHS Quality Parts – both built to deliver the reliability and effectiveness you expect. We're committed to providing solutions that minimize downtime and maximize your equipment's operational efficiency.

Seamless Digital Procurement & Rapid Delivery: 
Leveraging advanced logistics and a user-friendly e-commerce platform, we assure quick deliveries and a streamlined shopping experience, helping you get the right parts, right when you need them. 

Trusted Partnership & Expert Guidance: 
We serve as a trusted advisor, offering not just parts, but also comprehensive repair guides, FAQs, and troubleshooting content to support your team.  We're committed to fostering robust partnerships and adapting to the evolving needs of the construction industry.

We continue to innovate and grow, forging strong partnerships within the construction industry to keep your operations running smoothly. Connect with us to learn more about how DHS Equipment can be your go-to source for reliable, cost-effective construction equipment and replacement parts.

Met een ons specialistisch team staan we samen sterk voor diverse (technische) uitdagingen. Onze kracht is klanten volledig ‘ontzorgen’. Onze kernwaarden zijn kennis, service, kwaliteit en vakmanschap

Vanuit ons (nieuwe) pand in Hellevoetsluis met bovenloopkranen, magazijnen, wasplaats en op- en overslagruimte zitten wij in de directe nabijheid van de Rotterdamse haven. Wij zijn 24 uur per dag, 7 dagen per week, bereikbaar. U kunt bij ons terecht voor advies in aanschaf en onderhoud of wanneer u het beheer en onderhoud van één machine of uw volledige machinepark wilt uitbesteden. Wij nemen u de zorg hiervoor graag uit handen. Monteurs van STOOF zijn nationaal en internationaal inzetbaar.

STOOF is een erkend en geautoriseerd servicepartner voor veel fabrikanten waaronder: Genie - Terex MEWP, Toyota Industries - Aichi MEWP, LiuGong Machinery en TrackUnit telematica.

Inizialmente si specializza nell'assistenza autorizzata per alcuni marchi di Carrelli Elevatori e Movimento Terra. Nell'anno 2000 viene inaugurata l'attuale sede situata a Besnate (Va) dando inizio alla nuova attività di noleggio e vendita di Carrelli Elevatori e Movimento Terra. Con le Piattaforme Aeree, nel 2006, viene ulterioremente ampliata l'offerta dei macchinari a noleggio e in vendita. Ad oggi General Car, grazie alla sua ventennale esperienza, è in grado di garantire ai propri clienti la massima serietà, efficienza, qualità ed affidabilità. Dalla vendita al noleggio offriamo soluzioni altamente specifiche per le più svariate situazioni lavorative, mettendo a disposizione del cliente tutta la nostra esperienza e le migliori garanzie possibili.

Name: FALVE
Description:
Falve Sp. z o.o.
Z pasją i doświadczeniem dostarczamy rozwiązania w zakresie armatury przemysłowej oraz pomp. Naszą misją jest wspieranie przedsiębiorstw wodociągowych, energetycznych, przemysłowych i komunalnych w zapewnianiu niezawodnych instalacji i bezpiecznej eksploatacji systemów.

Jako partner wiodących producentów europejskich oferujemy:
 Pompy i systemy pompowania
 Armaturę przemysłową najwyższej jakości
 Profesjonalny serwis i doradztwo techniczne
 Szerokie zaplecze magazynowe w Polsce

Stawiamy na długofalową współpracę, jakość i terminowość dostaw. Nasz zespół łączy wiedzę techniczną z doświadczeniem biznesowym, co pozwala nam budować trwałe relacje z klientami i partnerami w całej Europie.

 W Falve wierzymy, że niezawodne rozwiązania to fundament bezpieczeństwa i rozwoju każdej instalacji.

Name: MAX MAINTENANCE SERVICES
Description:
Max Maintenance Service est le représentant officiel de la célèbre marque allemande STILL en matériel de manutention en Algérie. Nous sommes spécialisés dans la réparation, la vente de machines de manutention, incluant :

Chariots élévateurs électriques
Chariots rétractables
Gerbeurs électriques
Transpalettes
Tri-directionnels VNA
Chez Max Maintenance Service, nous proposons également une prise en charge complète de votre flotte. Nos techniciens qualifiés et expérimentés assurent un service de haute qualité, utilisant exclusivement des pièces de rechange d'origine.

Faites confiance à Max Maintenance Service pour toutes vos solutions de manutention et bénéficiez de notre expertise reconnue.

Name: Focquet
Description:
Active in more than 50 countries, SA Focquet is today the Belgian leader in electric motors, combining technical expertise, reactivity of services, availability of stock and family values for 130 years.  
 
Five departments are at the heart of our activities: electric motors, transformers, power electronics, geared motors and industrial pumps. This equipment can be used for various industrial applications.   

Our activities within these departments are mainly focused on the purchase, transformation, distribution and rental of industrial electrical equipment.  

We have one of the largest stocks available in Western Europe at all times, enabling us to respond quickly and easily to specific customer requests. Our considerable stock (18000 new motors, 3500 reconditioned motors in our 6000m² warehouse) allows us to meet your needs in record time. Our stock consists of cage motors, slip ring motors, DC motors, brake motors, stainless steel motors, high voltage motors, open IP23 motors and reconditioned motors. In addition, transformers, pumps and gear motors are also stocked in order to guarantee quick solutions.  

In addition, our workshop, made up of a dozen qualified professionals, transforms and adapts motors to your specific needs in terms of the desired form of assembly or their use, but also in terms of the installation of materials.  Focquet thus proposes solutions to measure which can answer the most demanding specifications of our customers.  Speed, reliability, flexibility and quality are the hallmarks of our company. It is this reputation that has enabled us, over the years, to take a strategic position in the market.

Name: MegWeld
Description:
About Us

Megweld Teknoloji ve Otomasyon is a leading distributor of industrial automation and robotic welding solutions in Turkey. We deliver high-efficiency, quality-driven welding systems and smart automation technologies that optimize manufacturing processes and increase productivity for medium to large-scale industrial operations.

As the official Turkish partner of Megmeet Welding Technology and Huayan Robotics, we provide tailor-made robotic welding cells, collaborative robots (cobots), advanced welding machines (MIG, TIG, MMA, laser welding), and fully integrated automation solutions.

With end-to-end engineering, installation, and after-sales support services, we help manufacturers reduce cycle times, improve welding quality consistency, and accelerate their transition to Industry 4.0.

Our solutions are widely used in industries such as automotive, metal fabrication, construction, and heavy machinery, enabling companies to gain a sustainable competitive advantage.

 Contact us for customized robotic welding systems, automation projects, and advanced welding solutions.

 Hakkımızda

Megweld Teknoloji ve Otomasyon, Türkiye’de endüstriyel otomasyon ve robotik kaynak çözümleri alanında faaliyet gösteren teknoloji odaklı bir firmadır. Orta ve büyük ölçekli üretim tesisleri için yüksek verimli, kalite odaklı kaynak sistemleri ve akıllı otomasyon teknolojileri sunar.

Megmeet Welding Technology ve Huayan Robotics’in Türkiye’deki resmi iş ortağı olarak; robotik kaynak hücreleri, kolaboratif robotlar (cobotlar), MIG, TIG, MMA ve lazer kaynak makineleri ile entegre otomasyon çözümleri sağlamaktayız.

Uçtan uca mühendislik, kurulum ve satış sonrası teknik destek hizmetlerimizle; otomotiv, metal işleme, inşaat ve ağır sanayi sektörlerinde üretim verimliliğini artırıyor, Endüstri 4.0 dönüşümüne katkı sağlıyoruz.

Name: Hybeko AS
Description:
Norges ledende lift- og løfteutstyrsleverandør

Siden vår etablering i 1972 har Hybeko stått i spissen for innovasjon og kvalitet innen lift- og løfteutstyr. Vår reise har vært preget av engasjement for å tilby kvalitetsprodukter, samtidig som vi sikrer enestående service og oppfølging for våre kunder.

Vår Målsetting: Med over 60 dyktige medarbeidere, er vår fremste prioritet å sette kunden i fokus. Vårt engasjement for kvalitet og kundetilfredshet har gjort oss til en sertifisert og dynamisk bedrift, der et sterkt fellesskap og et godt arbeidsmiljø er nøkkelen til vår suksess.

Vår Utvikling: Fra våre beskjedne begynnelser har vi utviklet oss til en markedsleder. I dag omfatter våre kjerneaktiviteter salg, produksjon av spesialmaskiner, samt service og levering av deler, alle tjener som bærebjelkene i vår forretningsidé.

Vårt Miljø: Hos Hybeko tror vi på å skape et miljø som ikke bare virker positivt innad, men også fungerer som en katalysator ut i markedet. Vi legger stor vekt på samhold, innovasjon, og en kultur som "løfter og begeistrer".

Vår Visjon: Som Norges ledende leverandør innen vårt felt, fortsetter vi å drive markedet fremover med banebrytende løsninger. Vi er dedikert til å utvikle produkter og tjenester som ikke bare møter, men overgår kundenes forventninger, og sikrer vår posisjon som en foregangsbedrift i bransjen.

Bli en del av vår reise: Følg oss på LinkedIn for å få siste nytt, innsikt, og oppdateringer fra Hybeko – der vi stadig streber etter å løfte standardene i vår industri.

Name: ADAMELEC
Description: ADAMELEC est spécialisée dans l'importation, l'exportation, l'achat, la maintenance, la vente et le commerce de tous matériels et en particulier le matériel d'automatisme, de télégestion, d'instrumentation, d'hydraulique, d'hydromécanique, de pneumatique, d'électricité, d'informatique, de surveillance, de détection et extinction d'incendie.

We focus particularly on private and family businesses and want to be a solid and reliable long-term partner for them. For us, people, and local entrepreneurship are paramount. http://www.temscoinc.com/ https://www.wcequipment.com/

Description:

Description:

As we from DJK work closely together with our suppliers, we have a detailed insight into the single steps of various production processes. Our people have an in-depth knowledge. Experience, expertise and flexibility distinguish us. With our knowledge and know-how we provide total solutions for your project and beyond.

Unsere Mitarbeiter besitzen ein fundiertes Fachwissen. Erfahrung, Kompetenz und Flexibilität zeichnen uns aus. Gemeinsam sehen wir unsere Kunden als Partner und finden mit viel Know-How die optimalsten Lösungen.

Name: Grosso Tractores
Description:

Actualmente, y en base a nuestra experiencia en el rubro, somos reconocidos también, por ofrecer las mejores usadas de la zona.

Nuestra visión: Ser socios estratégicos del cliente, acompañándolo con profesionalidad y compromiso.

Name: Oceania Power
Description:

Located in the heart of Brisbane's Trade Coast, Oceania Power oversees a network of specialised marine and industrial dealers located throughout the state, supplying engines, drives, generators (marine), spare parts and 24/7 support.
 
As the Queensland and PNG distributer for Volvo Penta marine and industrial and Rehlko Marine product lines, Oceania Power has a passionate and dedicated team of industry experts, experienced in supply and support; from project development on the drawing board, implementation of the power solutions, and support throughout the life cycle of the product.

Darüber hinaus werden Serviceleistungen wie UVV-Abnahmen, Wartungen und Instandsetzung angeboten.
Deutschland ist schon immer ein strategischer Markt für unsere Produkte, sowohl als Zielmarkt als auch als Tor zu den nordischen und baltischen Ländern.

Name: EQUIP INDUS

Since 2014, EQUIP INDUS has been supporting you in fitting out workstations and supplying standard or custom industrial equipment.

 Our mission ?

 A wide range of solutions :

 Welcome to EQUIP !

Name: Off-Piste Agri Ltd
Description:
Suppliers of solutions using industry leading manufacturers.

Name: ex Technimold - ora Energy Group
Description:
Technimold, oggi è diventata Energy Group, rivenditore Stratasys per l'Italia, a seguito della fusione avvenuta all'inizio del 2023.
Storicamente è stata il primo distributore Stratasys in Italia per stampanti 3D e sistemi di additive manufacturing per le aziende con sede operativa a Genova.

Dal 1992 forniamo stampanti 3D e sistemi di additive manufacturing per: rapid manufacturing, rapid tooling, etc. grazie alle quali è possibile creare sia prototipi funzionali che parti finite. 

Oltre alla vendita di sistemi e soluzioni professionali per aziende, le attività aziendali si concentrano sulla formazione per l'utilizzo dei macchinari acquistati, un servizio di assistenza tecnica disponibile in tutta Italia e sull'approvvigionamento di materiali di consumo.

Name: BEKS
Description: Pièces, pneus, équipements et services pour les engins roulants Caterpillar, Komatsu, Volvo... en carrières, mines, terrassement, routes

Name: Weschu Vertriebs GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
WESCHU vertreibt Werkzeugmaschinen und Heißkanaltechnik der Firma Günther.

Seit über vierzig Jahren tun wir das mit Erfolg. Wir überzeugen durch Praxis und nicht durch Theorie.

Wenn Sie uns in Nürnberg besucht haben und das WESCHU Technologie- und Vorführzentrum wieder verlassen, wissen Sie auch warum.

Genau dort zeigen wir Ihnen den Unterschied zwischen präsentieren und demonstrieren. Nichts ist überzeugender als praktisch mitzuerleben wie etwas funktioniert und warum Lösungen genau so aussehen müssen.

Hinter einem starken Vertriebspartner stehen immer starke Hersteller.

Mit Röders HSC-Fräsmaschinen Handlingssystemen und Software, Zimmer+Kreim Erodiermaschinen, Automation und Software, Sodick Drahtschneide- und Startlochbohrmaschinen, Günther Heißkanalsystemen, Ziersch Schleifmaschinen und Partool Nullpunktspannsystemen , vertreten wir waschechte Branchen-Profis, Hersteller, deren Produkte sich in der täglichen Praxis bestens bewähren.

Name: Cofabel
Description:
Cofabel is the importer and distributor of John Deere agricultural machinery and machines for maintaining golfs, parks and gardens, in Belgium. The John Deere brand goes back 181 years and has a very strong reputation. It is the undisputed number one in the world of farm machinery and equipment for environmental management. 
The basis of this worldwide success lies in John Deere’s permanent focus on innovation in machinery and solutions for agriculture and horticulture. Innovative technologies are effectively applied to tractors, hay and forage machinery, and sprayers. The AMS (Agricultural Management Solutions) contribute to obtain optimum technical results and subsequently a better turnover. Thanks to Farmsight, machines can communicate and the stored data ensure much better management.

Cofabel, together with JOHN DEERE, has the best spare parts delivery system in the farm machinery sector.

Cofabel is part of Arvesta. Interested in working for Arvesta or Cofabel? Visit www.werkplezier.be for our open vacancies.

Name: Ufuk Global
Description:
1989 yılında kurulan UFUK GLOBAL, ticari faaliyetlerine beyaz eşya sektöründe başlamış ve daha sonra gıda ve endüstriyel mutfak sektöründe faaliyetlerine devam etmiştir. Kurulduğu günden bugüne kadar kusursuz hizmet ilkesinden taviz vermeden hizmetlerini sürdürmektedir.

Güvenilir hizmet anlayışı sayesinde dünya liderlerinin Türkiye'de ve 3 kıtada temsilcisi olmuştur. Aynı zamanda global firmaların yanı sıra sektöründe lider birçok yerli firmada iş ortağı olarak Ufuk Global'i tercih etmiştir.

Ufuk Global, farklı sektörlerde hizmet göstererek gerek yurtiçi gerek yurtdışında birçok ihtiyaca cevap verebilmektedir. Özellikle endüstriyel mutfak alanında büyümeye odaklanan Ufuk Global, birlikte çalıştığı markalarla kaliteli ve kusursuz hizmet prensibiyle hareket etmektedir.

Name: SUMMIT
Description:
SUMMIT es una empresa dedicada a la comercialización, distribución y soporte técnico de maquinaria pesada para los sectores petrolero, logístico, industrial y de la construcción.
Somos representantes oficiales de XCMG en Neuquén y brindamos soluciones integrales que combinan tecnología de nivel mundial con asesoramiento especializado y servicio postventa confiable.

Trabajamos junto a empresas de toda la región ofreciendo equipos de alto rendimiento, repuestos originales, financiamiento y acompañamiento en cada etapa del proceso de compra.
Nuestra misión es aportar potencia, precisión y respaldo local a cada proyecto.

Name: Aslak Machines&Tools
Description:
Aslak forma parte del sector industrial de maquinaria y herramientas desde hace más de 30 años. Se ha ganado la reputación de líder en el mercado de suministro industrial gracias a la calidad de su servicio, sus proyectos innovadores y la enorme experiencia que ha adquirido durante su trayectoria.

Los especialistas y socios europeos de la empresa han desarrollado una nueva tecnología en el sector centrándose en la exhaustiva selección y control de los artículos. Su principal objetivo es ofrecer la más amplia selección de marcas, productos y profesionales al mejor precio.

Aslak cuenta con el respaldo de fabricantes europeos reconocidos que comparten su filosofía a la hora de buscar la máxima calidad al mejor precio. Entre estas empresas se encuentran Optimum, Tengtools, Limit y Telwin, entre otras.

Todos los productos distribuidos por Aslak garantizan un perfecto funcionamiento gracias a las rigurosas inspecciones que se realizan desde su producción hasta que son usados por el cliente. Ofrece también un servicio ágil y respuestas inmediata ante posibles averías.

Otra de las ventajas de elegir Aslak es que presenta sus servicios y productos ordenados en el catálogo más amplio que existe en el mercado. Además todos se presentan acompañados de una ficha técnica que aporta al profesional todos los datos necesarios para el conocimiento del artículo.

Equipo Humano
Aslak cuenta con profesionales que disponen de una preparación sólida y están a disposición de los clientes en todo momento para consultas o demostraciones.

No nos gusta hacer esperar a nuestros clientes, así que servimos en menos de 48 horas desde los almacenes de Sant Quirze del Vallés. Gracias al equipo humano y al amplio stock del que disponemos conseguimos rapidez sin dejar de lado la calidad.

Aportamos una solución para cada necesidad con la ayuda de trabajadores comprometidos y con un espíritu joven. Satisfacer las necesidades de nuestros clientes es siempre la prioridad de Aslak.

Name: Clean Blast International LLC
Description:
The Clean Blast International offers a complete range of surface preparation equipment and accessories. Clean Blast International is based in Dubai in the United Arab Emirates and have own branch offices in Doha (Qatar), AbuDhabi (U.A.E) and India and is serving the other areas of Middle East with a network of distributors.

Our portfolio of products is categorized mainly into Blasting & Painting Equipment, Concrete Surface Preparation Machines, and Diamond Cutting Technologies.

Besides the above products our engineering division is very well capable & experienced in complete turn key projects for designing , installing and commissioning Blast Room, Paint Booth, Dust Collectors, Recovery Systems, Abrasive Recycling Machine etc, thus covering everything under one roof in surface preparation. For meeting the special requirement of Shipyards, Marine and Oil field service industry. CLEAN BLAST have Dehumidifier, Suction Units , High Pressure Washing Machines , Recovery Hoses etc in our scope of supply.
Clean Blast also have special equipment for airport runway construction and maintenance like runway paint marking and removal, rubber deposit removal equipment, runway grooving machines besides concrete and asphalt cutting with diamond cutting technology. ARTFLEX, distributeur de robinetterie industrielle, d’accessoires de tuyauterie et pompes, c'est :
- plus de 20 ans d’expertise dans la maîtrise des fluides,
- une offre qui s’étend des équipements standards aux matériels et pièces d’usinage « spéciales » et techniques,
- une réponse globale pour des clients exigeants évoluant dans les secteurs de l'industrie, de la pharmacie/cosmétologie, de l'agro-alimentaire, de l'environnement, de l'énergie, de la chimie/pétrochimie et du génie climatique,
- une confiance gagnée des grands groupes de construction et de concessions tels que EIFFAGE, VINCI, SUEZ...

Sa notoriété s'affiche sur le grand bassin lyonnais, sur les régions Rhône-Alpes Auvergne et Bourgogne Franche Comté. ARTFLEX s’est également fait un nom sur le marché national avec une agence située dans le Nord au sud de Lille, et une force technico-commerciale experte sur l’ensemble de ces zones ainsi que sur le grand bassin parisien. 

Nous vous invitons à découvrir le parcours d'ARTFLEX sur son site internet, lien accessible en page d'accueil.

ARTFLEX, l'Art de la Robinetterie industrielle
A votre service

Name: Convertec Graphic Technics AB
Description:
Convertec Graphic Technics AB was founded in 1987, in Gothenburg, Sweden, and has more than 30 years of experience in distributing and servicing Converting, Printing and Die-cutting Machinery and Equipment to the Nordic Packaging Industry within the following sectors:

- Narrow Web Labels
- Cardboard and Corrugated Packaging
- Sign and Print 
- Display and POS/POP
- Visual Communication

We represent innovative and world leading suppliers from Central - and South Europe as well as The United States of America. Some of them are Mark Andy, A B Graphic International, Kongsberg PCS, Koenig & Bauer Iberica, Koenig & Bauer Duran, FELIX GLUER, Kohmann, Gietz etc.

As distributors and agents in the Nordic countries, we work as the extended arm of our machine manufacturers being their local partner not only for sales, but also for the important after sales service and support. Our goal is to improve and grow our customers' and partners' business, focusing on their needs from the first contact to the final delivery, installation, and training.  We offer a full support to suit our customers specific needs for service and preventive maintenance.

Besides providing printing and converting machinery we also offer a wide range of auxiliary equipment and consumables to further improve the complete production process. Needless to say are we also abreast with the many new technologies of digital printing and die-cutting.

Name: IMPAKT Recycling Solutions
Description:
Wij zijn IMPAKT en samen met onze partners streven we een toonaangevende rol na wanneer het aankomt op hoogwaardig recyclen. Dat doen we met oplossingen die werkelijk iets toevoegen, zo mogelijk overal en altijd.  Maskin Mekano is daar met haar elektrisch aangedreven mobiele, semi-mobiele en stationaire breek- en zeefinstallaties  een goed voorbeeld van. De zeefinstallaties van Maskin Mekano onderscheiden zich  wanneer het aankomt op optimaal gescheiden fracties (fijn & grof); het hele jaar, dus óók in natte weersomstandigheden en óók bij vochtig materiaal.  Recyclen is immers geen seizoenswerk.

Wir sind IMPAKT und nehmen gemeinsam mit unseren Partnern eine führende Rolle ein, wenn es um hochwertiges Recycling geht. Das tun wir mit Lösungen, die wirklich etwas bringen, und zwar möglichst überall und zu jeder Zeit.  Maskin Mekano mit seinen elektrisch betriebenen mobilen, semimobilen und stationären Brech- und Siebanlagen ist ein gutes Beispiel dafür. Die Siebanlagen von Maskin Mekano zeichnen sich durch eine optimale Trennung der Fraktionen (fein und grob) aus; und das das ganze Jahr über, also auch bei nassem Wetter und sogar bei feuchtem Material.  Denn Recycling ist keine Saisonarbeit.

Name: VKR technologies s.r.o.
Description:
Společnost VKR technologies s.r.o. se dlouhodobě specializuje na návrhy technického řešení a následné dodávky a servis kompletního technologického vybavení pro firmy zabývající se zpracováním plechů a veškerých kovových materiálů a výrobků. 

Spolupracujeme s těmi nejlepšími z celého světa a na český a slovenský trh přinášíme ta nejkvalitnější a v mnoha případech zcela unikátní HI-TECH technická řešení z oblasti dělení materiálu, rovnání, ohýbání, zakružování, broušení, odjehlování a sjednocování povrchů, kartáčování, leštění i finální úpravy veškerých kovových materiálů a výrobků, včetně kompletních linek a plně automatických pracovišť! 

Z těchto důvodů jsme schopni navrhnout opravdu ideální řešení přesně dle Vašich požadavků
! 
Mezi naše zákazníky se řadí nejznámější strojírenské firmy a společnosti zabývající se výrobou kovových dílců, konstrukcí i finálních produktů, ale naše výrobky a služby nachází uplatnění také v oblasti zpracování kamene, skla, keramiky apod. 

Naším hlavním cílem je poskytnout všem zákazníkům komplexní péči a pomoci jim v neustálém zlepšování a inovaci výrobních procesů vedoucích k dosažení co nevyšší kvality  výsledných produktů, snižování výrobních nákladů a samozřejmě také zajištění bezpečného pracovního prostředí! 

Při poskytování našich služeb dbáme na osobní přístup ke každému jednotlivému zákazníkovi a snažíme se o co nejrychlejší reakci na Vaše potřeby a požadavky!

De esta forma, como equipo en CNC Chile LTDA también nos enofcamos en entregar servicios tales como:

-Puesta en Marcha de Máquinas CNC (en la localidad de los Clientes) 
-Servicio Técnico Integral de Equipos CNC

-Capacitaciones a nivel elemental e integral de Operación y Control de Máquinas CNC 

Todo esto, con el fin de entregar un servicio de completo y de alta calidad a nuestros clientes, desde la cotización de  Máquinas CNC, hasta su posterior puesta en Marcha y Operación en el sitio de los clientes. 

Visita nuestra página web, cotiza con nosotros y sé parte de la excelencia en Máquinas CNC!

Name: EO2S SAS
Description:
E.O.2.S (Energie Optimisation Services et Solutions). 

[FR] : EO2S, leader européen de la détection indirecte de gaz, se consacre aux technologies innovantes de réfrigération et de climatisation qui améliorent à la fois l'efficacité et la durabilité.
Ces solutions de pointe sont issues d’une vaste expérience en ingénierie frigorifique ainsi que des rôles de leadership dans des bureaux d’études, où en tant que directeur technique. Les fondateurs ont collaboré avec les principaux installateurs de réfrigération.
Avec plus de 6 800 SMART installés, EO2S se positionne comme le leader du secteur, démontrant des avancées remarquables dans ce domaine.

La société E.O.2.S commercialise, entre autres, des produits tel que :
- le système SMART (Suivi par Modélisation Adaptative de Recherche de Tendance)
- le système ICE (Intégrateur de Calculs Energétiques)

[EN] : EO2S, the European leader in indirect gas detection, is dedicated to innovative refrigeration and air conditioning technologies that improve both efficiency and sustainability.
These cutting-edge solutions are the result of extensive experience in refrigeration engineering, as well as leadership roles in design offices and as technical directors. The founders have worked with leading refrigeration installers.
With more than 6,800 SMART installed, EO2S is positioned as the industry leader, demonstrating remarkable progress in this field.

The company E.O.2.S markets, among other things, products such as:
- the SMART system (Adaptive Trend Research Modeling Monitoring)
- the ICE system (Energy Calculation Integrator)

Name: SoftPlast
Description:
Od 2004 roku budujemy kompleksową ofertę urządzeń i komponentów, cenionych przez działy produkcyjne firm na całym świecie. Nasze produkty znajdują zastosowanie w produkcji szeroko pojętej reklamy zewnętrznej i wewnętrznej, plandek, namiotów, markiz, zasłon oraz rolet.

W ofercie posiadamy m.in.:
– zgrzewarki na gorące powietrze,
– zgrzewarki impulsowe,
– zgrzewarki wysokiej częstotliwości (HF),
– stoły do cięcia,
– trymery,
– automaty szyjące,
– zakuwarki elektryczne i pneumatyczne,
– laminatory i kalandry,
– a także akcesoria takie jak: oczka metalowe i plastikowe, taśmy PVC, linki, keder oraz inne komponenty z tworzyw sztucznych.

Współpracujemy z dostawcami o wieloletnim doświadczeniu, którzy nieustannie inwestują w rozwój technologii i jakość swoich produktów. Jako Generalny Dystrybutor, SoftPlast oferuje nie tylko dostęp do sprawdzonych rozwiązań, ale także:

– fachowe doradztwo przy doborze urządzeń i komponentów,
– indywidualne podejście do każdego klienta,
– prezentacje i szkolenia,
– serwis gwarancyjny i pogwarancyjny,
– oraz przede wszystkim – długoterminową, lojalną współpracę.

Name: MEGATRON EAD
Description:
Мегатрон ЕАД е основана през 1998 г. и е официален представител в България на водещите световни производители John Deere, KUHN, Bobcat и Develon. Повече от 27 години сме на българския пазар и сме безспорен лидер в продажбата, поддръжката и сервизното обслужване на висококачествената земеделска, строителна, горска, голф и градинска техника, която предлагаме.
От създаването си не спираме да инвестираме в изграждането на модерни търговско-сервизни комплекси, разположени в регионите с важно икономическо значение – София, Плевен, Русе, Добрич, Търговище, Силистра, Пловдив, Стара Загора, Ямбол, Монтана и Българово (Бургас). Нашите 11 представителства са със стратегическо местоположение – само на час път от най-отдалечените клиенти в съответния регион – и осигуряват работни места на повече от 260 човека.
‘Близо до вас’ е нашето мото. Спазваме отговорно това обещание към нашите клиенти и сме там, където имат нужда от нас – на полето, в селскостопанския двор, на строителната площадка, в сервиза. Готови сме да реагираме по всяко време, за да затвърдим гласуваното ни доверие.

НАШАТА МИСИЯ
Доставяме иновативни, надеждни и рентабилни решения, разработени от лидерите в бранша, които подпомагат успеха на клиентите ни. Изграждаме дългосрочни партньорства като предоставяме обслужване на световно ниво и най-новите технологии.

НАШАТА ВИЗИЯ
Градим устойчиво бъдеще, като предоставяме водещи световни технологии за множество бизнеси, с цел да постигнем положително въздействие както за компанията, така и за средата, в която работим.

НАШИТЕ ЦЕННОСТИ
ПОЧТЕНОСТ – КАЧЕСТВО – АНГАЖИРАНОСТ – ИНОВАЦИИ 
Нашите ценности са отражение на поведението ни и общуването ни с клиенти, партньори и колеги. Помагат ни да създадем приобщаваща работна среда, към която се гордеем че принадлежим.

Name: Bruhat
Description:
Depuis plus de 100 ans, L'entreprise Bruhat est un acteur incontournable dans le secteur du recyclage et de la fourniture industrielle incarnant savoir-faire, innovation et engagement envers nos clients. 

Fondée en 1923, notre entreprise n’a cessé de se développer en restant fidèle à ses valeurs d'origine : qualité, intégrité et proximité avec nos partenaires. Aujourd’hui, avec des équipes passionnées et dédiées, nous continuons d'innover pour répondre aux défis de demain tout en préservant l'héritage qui fait notre force. 

Chez Bruhat, nous croyons en l'importance de la tradition tout en regardant vers l'avenir. Nous sommes fiers de notre longévité et de la confiance que nous accordent nos clients et collaborateurs depuis un siècle. 


#Entreprise #TraditionEtInnovation #Bruhat#Centenaire #Engagement #recyclage#fournitureindustrielle #fer# produitssidérurgiques#lesbronzesetallizgesdechampagne#bac#roughol#plastifer

Name: Hersan · Maquinaria para la Madera
Description:
Hersan J.J.E. Hernández S.A. es una empresa de Hellín (Albacete) fundada en 1954 por José Hernández Sánchez, dedicada a la venta y distribución de maquinaria para la madera.

Nos adaptamos a las necesidades particulares de cada cliente, ofreciendo siempre una solución personalizada a los mejores precios del mercado, para ello disponemos de las representaciones de primeras firmas del mercado internacional y nacional, donde se desarrollan las máquinas con la tecnología más avanzada que hay actualmente, y con una preocupación constante por métodos y controles de calidad, desde el diseño, dialogo hombre-máquina y pasando hasta por la puesta en marcha.

Mantenemos a nuestros clientes al tanto de las novedades en el sector y las ferias de maquinaria para la madera, así como las jornadas de muestra que organizamos nosotros mismos en nuestras instalaciones, mediante nuestra web y mailing estarán al día de la última tecnología.

La base de nuestra empresa es un equipo joven y dinámico, con una calidad tanto profesional como humana, que se compromete a dar soluciones a las necesidades de los clientes.

Name: ALDA
Description:
PUH ALDA powstało w 1992 roku i od 30 lat zajmuje się kompleksowym „sprzedawaniem czystości”, będąc dealerem marek Kärcher, Nilfisk, RGS Vacuum Systems, Viper oraz Spacevac.
Oferujemy pełen asortyment maszyn czyszczących i sprzętu do utrzymania produkcji, a także wsparcie w odpowiednim doborze sprzętu do potrzeb. Rekomendujemy rozwiązania w zakresie zarządzania czystością w oparciu o 30-letnie doświadczenie.
Kompleksowość usług zapewnia także serwis gwarancyjny i pogwarancyjny oraz montaże centralnych systemów: mycia ciśnieniowego, odkurzania, odpylania, transportu pneumatycznego.

Name: AGROMEX s.r.o.
Description:
Agromex is a leading supplier of agricultural and specialized machinery, consistently expanding since its founding in 1992. For over three decades, Agromex has provided top-quality agricultural equipment and comprehensive services tailored to the specific needs of farmers. 

As a proud member of the Danish Agro group since 2016, Agromex offers a wide range of products from renowned brands such as Fendt, Weidemann, Kröger, Kerner, and Pellenc, meeting diverse requirements for soil cultivation, planting, forage harvesting, and crop protection.

Agromex has an extensive network of branches and service centers across the Czech Republic. With branches in Modletice near Prague, Cerekvice near Hradec Králové, Myslinka near Plzeň, Starý Jičín, České Budějovice, and Brno, and service centers in Slatina, Žamberk, Blížkovice, and Havlíčkův Brod, Agromex provides prompt support to customers nationwide.

Name: MeyerV

Name: Van Trier BV
Description: Van Trier is one of the oldest family businesses in the Netherlands, which has been passed down from father to son throughout its history. The company was founded in 1746 as a forge in the small town of De Heen and is now operating in a 30,000m² facility in Tholen. In 1996, Her Majesty the Queen granted Van Trier the right to use the Royal Coat of Arms and the title 'By Royal Warrant Supplier' due to its long history. The current owner, Gijs van Trier, represents the ninth generation in the company. Throughout the generations, Van Trier has been able to evolve and innovate, becoming the modern conveyor rental company it is today. Nowadays, Van Trier rents out 2,000 conveyors, ship loader, hoppers, and similar equipment for bulk handling worldwide each year.

Linie produkcyjne to systemy naczyń połączonych, zbudowane z wielu współpracujących stanowisk, tworzone w celu optymalizacji wydajności pracy. Obszarem naszej działalności jest ich ostatnie, bardzo ważne ogniwo - proces pakowania. Kierujemy nacisk na podwyższenie sprawności, zwiększenie efektywności oraz zapewnienie jego ciągłości.

Dzięki zdobywanej przez lata wiedzy, możemy przygotować oraz wdrożyć system pakujący dla Państwa przedsiębiorstwa.  Nasze doświadczenie pozwala nam  fachowo doradzić rozwiązanie, które wyjdzie naprzeciw indywidualnym potrzebom klienta. 

Zapewniamy trwałość oraz ciągłość pracy naszych maszyn, prowadząc regularne przeglądy techniczne oraz serwisy. Dbamy o ich jakość, współpracując z fabrykami m. in. z Włoch czy Chin. Posiadamy  Wykonujemy usługi serwisowe maszyn innych producentów.  Oferujemy doradztwo technicznie przy wdrożeniu, uruchomieniu czy problemach technicznych związanych z liniami pakowania produktu.

Name: Nacanco
Description:
Nacanco was originally founded in the 1980s as the rental division of Ibercarretillas S.A., which at the time was the exclusive distributor in Spain for forklift trucks under the Italian brand FIAT–PIMESPO.
In the early 1990s, the company evolved rapidly into a specialist in the rental of Aerial Work Platforms (AWPs), expanding operations across Spain and Italy. By 2007, Nacanco had reached a turnover of €40 million, with a fleet of around 4,000 units and a workforce of 200 employees fully dedicated to rental services.

After a successful run, the Nacanco brand exited the rental industry: it was acquired by HUNE in Spain (2007) and by LOXAM in Italy (2017).

Today, Nacanco continues as the name and brand of Stefano Giusto’s independent consulting and trading business, active across all of Europe, with a strong emphasis on Southern countries such as Italy, Spain, France, and Portugal.

Nacanco specializes in the trading of used lifting equipment, including:

Aerial Work Platforms (AWPs)

Self-Propelled Platforms

Truck-Mounted Platforms

Spider Platforms

Telehandlers

Forklifts

All-terrain Mobile Cranes

The company supports rental businesses, industrial operators, and fleet managers with strategic sourcing, international resale operations, and market intelligence on used equipment.

Additionally, Nacanco is an ambassador and independent promoter of LoJack solutions, advocating for the integration of telematics, anti-theft systems, and fleet tracking technologies within the equipment rental and resale ecosystem.

Name: ACLIMA
Description:
Компанія Aclima представляє на українському ринку системи вентиляції і кондиціювання від провідних світових виробників.
Сьогодні в пул нашої компанії входять 17 брендів, що пропонують останні досягнення Європи, Азії та США у сфері керування кліматом. 
Серед продукції, яку ми постачаємо своїм клієнтам, — промислові та напівпромислові агрегати, а також установки, придатні для побутового користування.
Асортимент продукції та ціновий діапазон настільки широкі, що задовольнять потреби клієнта будь-якого рівня. 

НАША МІСІЯ

Запровадити сучасний концептуальний підхід до впровадження обладнання з підтримки мікроклімату як для промислового, так і для побутового секторів.
Концептуальний мікроклімат для об'єктів будь-якої складності.
Ми маємо намір змінити встановлений, на нашу думку, несучасний підхід до продажу обладнання для підтримання мікроклімату та перейти від реалізації обладнання до реалізації концепцій.
Ми робитимемо все, що від нас буде залежати, аби всі учасники ринку змінили свій погляд у сторону концептуального рішення мікроклімату. 
Ми маємо на меті використання тільки сучасного та енергоефективного обладнання.
 Ми не зупинимося у прагненні знайти та запропонувати найефективнішу та економічно вигідну концепцію для кожного Замовника. #AclimaУкраїна

Name: Fiaba Srl
Description:
La famiglia Ferraretto iniziò la propria attività alla fine del XIX secolo, come fabbri e artigiani dei metalli.
Il duro lavoro e l'instancabile impegno valsero ai loro prodotti due importanti riconoscimenti: Croce al Merito e Medaglia d'Oro all'Esposizione dell'Industria e del Commercio di Milano del 1923.

L'attuale azienda Fiaba è stata fondata 57 anni fa dai fratelli Marcelio e Annunzio Ferraretto ed aveva sede a Camisano Vicentino. Nasce come produttore di seghetti, seghe ad arco, riparazione e vendita al dettaglio di utensili manuali e articoli di ferramenta destinati al mercato locale.

Nel 1995 Fiaba ha cambiato la propria registrazione con la denominazione di Fiaba S.r.l. e si è completamente separata dal negozio al dettaglio originale. La nuova società nasce come distributore all'ingrosso a livello nazionale, concessionario esclusivo per il territorio italiano. La crescita dell'azienda è continuata negli anni successivi, aggiungendo al proprio portafoglio diversi nuovi marchi statunitensi, giapponesi e cinesi.

Ciò ha richiesto strutture più grandi, che sono state acquisite per una superficie totale di 14.000 mq, di cui 8.000 mq coperti ampliati con ulteriori 3.000 mq di fabbricato laterale.

Name: O jus
Description:
Chez O-jus, notre passion est de transformer l'ordinaire en extraordinaire grâce à notre gamme de machines à jus Zumex. Avec plus de 4 années d'expérience dans le secteur des boissons fraîches, nous sommes fiers d'être votre partenaire de confiance pour répondre à tous vos besoins de préparation de jus et de boissons.
 Presse-Agrumes Zumex : La Fraîcheur à l'État Pur
Notre gamme de presse-agrumes Zumex est conçue pour extraire le meilleur des agrumes, qu'il s'agisse d'oranges, de citrons, de pamplemousses ou de citrons verts. Ces machines de précision garantissent que chaque goutte de jus est fraîche, pure et pleine de saveur.
 Découpe Ananas Zumex : Une Touche Tropicale
Ajoutez une touche exotique à votre menu avec nos découpe-ananas Zumex. Faciles à utiliser, elles transforment rapidement et efficacement des ananas entiers en délices prêts à déguster, parfait pour les cocktails, les jus et les salades.
 Centrifugeuses Zumex : L'Art de la Pulpe
Nos centrifugeuses Zumex sont conçues pour extraire le maximum de saveur et de nutriments de vos fruits et légumes. Leur technologie de pointe réduit le gaspillage et garantit une consistance parfaite dans chaque lot.
 Pourquoi O-jus ?
Qualité Exceptionnelle : Nos machines Zumex sont synonymes d'excellence, de durabilité et de performances exceptionnelles.
Polyvalence : Que vous soyez un café, un bar, un restaurant ou un hôtel ou autre, notre gamme répond à tous vos besoins.
Service Client de Premier Ordre : Notre équipe est là pour vous aider à chaque étape, de la sélection de l'équipement à l'entretien continu.
  Plus que des Machines - Une Expérience
O-jus ne se contente pas de vendre des machines, nous créons des expériences. Chaque gorgée de jus préparée avec nos équipements est une expérience sensorielle, une explosion de saveurs et de fraîcheur.
 Engagement envers la Durabilité
Nous nous engageons à minimiser notre empreinte environnementale.

Name: PMB – Centralsmøring
Description:
Vi leverer, monterer, reparerer og servicerer centralsmøresystemer til industri, offshore, kørende- og entreprenørmateriel. 

Er du på udkig efter et centralsmøreanlæg til din virksomhed? Hos Povl Møllers Maskinfabrik får du en driftssikker og holdbar smøreløsning, der er skræddersyet efter dine behov og krav. Vi har mere end 60 års erfaring med levering, montering, reparation og service af komplette smøresystemer til små og store erhverv. 

Vi ved, at din maskine er omdrejningspunktet for din daglige drift og forretning. Det er derfor afgørende, at maskinens bevægelige dele, lejer, bøsninger og føringer løbende smøres. Med et automatisk centralsmøresystem bliver din maskine eller andet materiel smurt under drift. På den måde udnytter du effektivt din maskine og undgår dyre driftsstop, der kan mærkes på bundlinjen. 

Korrekt vedligehold kan forlænge en maskines levetid betydeligt og øge anlæggets produktivitet og effektivitet. Her er smøring et vigtigt stadie. Der er dog ofte mange omkostninger forbundet med manuelt vedligehold. Med et centralt smøresystem får du den rette mængde smørelse på det rigtige tidspunkt. Det sikrer lavere forbrug af fedt og færre menneskelige ressourcer forbundet med vedligehold. Alt i alt lavere vedligeholdsomkostninger og færre reparationer.

Vi sørger for, at dit smøresystem lever op til højeste standard for funktionalitet og driftssikkerhed. Hos Povl Møllers Maskinfabrik samarbejder vi udelukkende med verdens førende leverandører – herunder SKF Lubrication Systems (tidligere Vogel). Det er din garanti for, at kvaliteten, vi leverer, altid er i top.

Har du brug for råd og vejledning til levering og montering af dit nye centralsmøreanlæg, eller leder du efter en ny samarbejdspartner til service og reparation af din eksisterende smøreløsning? Vores erfarne serviceteknikere står klar til at hjælpe dig med at finde den løsning, der matcher dine ønsker, behov og krav.

Kontakt os, og få et uforpligtende tilbud.

Name: H&H Maskin AS
Description:
H&H Maskin AS – maskiner for proffer er nasjonal importør av minigravere, hjulgravere samt hjullastere, elektriske hjullastere i tillegg til teleskoplastere, beltedumpere og hydrauliske hammere og utstyr i kompaktsegmentet inntil 12 tonn fra noen av verdens ledende produsenter som Yanmar CE, Kramer GmbH og NPK.

Vi leverer altså alle typer maskiner til alle kunde typer. Videre er vi en fleksibel leverandør som strekker oss det lille ekstra for kundene.

Videre har vi et landsdekkende forhandler og service nettverk som ivaretar eksisterende nye og potensielle kunder i hele Norge.

H&H Maskin AS kan selvsagt også tilby finansiering gjennom våre finansieringspartnere.

Service er den del av vår virksomhet som kanskje er viktigst. Dette fordi våre kunder stoler på den høye kvaliteten på våre produkter. Det er vår oppgave å ivareta våre kunders driftsbehov og vite hva det handler om. Vi har derfor et stort og moderne og meget godt utstyrt verksted på Solgaard Skog 9. Svært dyktige og dedikerte mekanikere som takler ethvert serviceoppdrag til våre kunders store tilfredshet. Men selvsagt har vi også et antall verkstedsbiler som ruller daglig ut for å hjelpe våre kunder hvor de måtte trenge det.

Serviceavtaler kan vi tilby til de fleste av de maskiner vi leverer til kundene over ønsket avtaleperiode. Ta gjerne kontakt med vår serviceavdeling for mer informasjon om serviceavtaler.

H&H Maskin AS – maskiner for proffer. Velkommen til en hyggelig handel.
