Name: MANFERDINI s.r.l.
Description:
Da sempre il nome della nostra azienda è legato al settore della meccanizzazione agricola , settore che come molti altri, si evolve velocemente, richiedendo sempre maggiore professionalità, serietà e qualità di servizio. Esserci dal 1971 è la testimonianza più convincente che queste caratteristiche e lo stretto rapporto con il cliente portano sempre buoni risultati in qualsiasi ambito lavorativo. Fondata come attività individuale a carattere artigianale da Giovanni Manferdini nel 1971, la nostra azienda è cresciuta progressivamente passando da attività prettamente di riparazione di macchine agricole a concessionaria vera e propria di importanti marchi nazionali ed esteri.
Così, allargando gli ambiti di impiego e le attività di competenza nel 2001 si costituisce la odierna MANFERDINI s.r.l. e nello stesso anno inizia una ristrutturazione dei prodotti e dei marchi trattati, al fine di seguire e soddisfare sempre al meglio le esigenze dei nostri clienti. 
Oggi possiamo affermare di aver raggiunto accordi commerciali con produttori leader del mercato e che questi accordi ci collocano in una posizione di riferimento nel nostro settore. La gestione Service e Ricambi e la fornitura di Servizi legati al mondo agricolo è cresciuta di pari passo all'attività. In questi settori abbiamo concentrato la maggioranza degli investimenti e rappresentano ancora oggi i filoni principali della nostra mission aziendale. Lavoriamo ogni giorno per crescere e fornire ottimi prodotti, un'assistenza tecnica alla loro altezza, un magazzino ricambi rifornito e ben organizzato e servizi finanziari e di consulenza adeguati alle necessità della moderna imprenditoria agricola.

Yüksek kaliteli ürünlerimiz ve müşteri odaklı hizmet anlayışımızla, iş süreçlerinizdeki verimliliği artırmak ve ihtiyaçlarınıza en uygun çözümleri sunmak için buradayız. Kaynakteknoloji.com, endüstriyel ekipmanlar ve çözümler konusunda güvenilir ortağınız olmaktan gurur duyar.

Name: Iron Mak

 PREMIUM EQUIPMENT PORTFOLIO

•  Goodeng: Horizontal Directional Drills (HDD) and Trenchless Drilling (MND) equipment, ideal for fiber optic, gas, and sewer infrastructure.

 WHY CHOOSE IRON MAK?
•  6 authorized service centers across Brazil for expert technical support.
•  Pre- and post-sale technical visits to ensure seamless operation.
•  Fast parts replacement and factory warranties, with personalized follow-up.

 Beyond distribution, we specialize in China sourcing, delivering tailored solutions with a team deeply experienced in global markets.

 CONTACT US

O’Connors have been leading the way in the Agricultural industry for over 60 years, serving Australia’s farmers with the latest machinery, precision ag equipment and after sales service. CONTRIBUTE

At O’Connors we pride ourselves on being a great place to work. This means we attract, retain & develop the best people who are aligned to our organisational values & behaviours; strive to create environments that are great places to work that connect and motivate our people; reward & recognise our people for high performance and alignment to our core values & behaviours; & we will develop and support our people to realise their career potential. 

VALUES

O'Connors are committed to providing a great experience, opportunities & culture within the workplace for our people to prosper. We put an emphasis on recruiting people aligned with our core values & take very seriously our obligation to be a positive influence in our local communities. By recruiting quality people, & investing in training to provide an environment where our people can continue to develop for them & our organisation to remain the industry leaders.

BRANCHES

Employing approximately 380 people in various roles throughout our dealership network we offer great career opportunities for talented, passionate people who are keen to start a career in the AG industry. Specialising in Case IH agricultural equipment, O'Connors are committed to supporting customers and their equipment to maximise efficiency and increase productivity.

O’Connors own & operate 15 Case IH agricultural machinery dealerships across three states. Select locations also provide New Holland agriculture and construction machinery, parts, and expert support for all equipment needs.

Name: LG Tec
Description: LG Tec est le spécialiste français de la fabrication et de la fourniture de fonds bombés de qualité. Notre entreprise propose une large gamme de fonds bombés normalisés qui couvre toutes les références de fonds bombés normés. Vous pouvez trouver chez LG Tec des fonds bombés PRC, MRC, GRC, des fonds à double paroi, des fonds inversés, des calottes, des cônes, des fonds elliptiques, des fonds plats, des fonds hémisphériques, et plus encore. Vous pouvez choisir les dimensions et les finitions les plus spécifiques pour vos fonds bombés en fonction de vos besoins. Nous maîtrisons un stock étendu couvrant toutes les références normalisées, pour tous types de nuances (acier carbone, aciers inoxydables, alliages de nickel et aluminium). Nous sommes également en mesure de répondre à vos besoins de finitions les plus spécifiques. Fonds bombés normés ou sur mesure : Nous proposons des fonds bombés normés du dé à coudre jusqu'à 4 mètres de diamètre pour les modèles GRC, MRC ou PRC, et jusqu'à 5 mètres de diamètre pour les modèles elliptiques ou à double paroi. • Fonds bombés GRC (conformes à la norme NF E 81-102) couramment utilisés dans le secteur de la chaudronnerie industrielle. • Fonds bombés PRC (conformes à la norme NF E 81-101) principalement utilisés dans les secteurs de la chaudronnerie et de la tuyauterie industrielle. • Fonds bombés MRC (conformes à la norme NFE 81-104) principalement utilisés dans les secteurs de la chaudronnerie et de la tuyauterie industrielle. • Fonds bombés elliptiques (conformes à la norme NF E 81-103) plus profonds que les fonds à grand rayon de carré (GRC) et fréquemment utilisés pour les cuves à pression. • Fonds pour réservoirs à double paroi - particulièrement recommandés pour les cuves industrielles à fortes exigences sécuritaires ou soumises à de forte variation de température.

Name: Flexy (M) Sdn. Bhd.
Description:
Flexy (M) Sdn Bhd is a Malaysia-based engineering solutions provider specialising in premium industrial hoses, instrument valves, tube fittings and pipeline pigs for demanding applications across oil & gas (upstream and downstream), aviation, marine, semiconductor, palm oil and general industry. Since 2010, we’ve been helping plant owners, EPCs and maintenance teams move fluids and gases safely, efficiently and reliably. 

From our base in Port Klang, we supply a comprehensive range of products, including:

- Industrial hoses (composite, braided stainless steel, rubber, hydraulic and more) 
- Instrument fittings & tubing, and instrument valves
- Hose couplings, safety couplings and expansion joints
- Pigging equipment and accessories

Customers choose Flexy because we focus on more than just product supply:

-Engineering-led solutions – We help match the right hose, valve or pigging solution to your process, pressure, temperature and media requirements. 
-Quality, warranty & full traceability – Our products are backed by guarantees and traceability for peace of mind in safety-critical environments. 
-Value-added services – In-house pressure testing, third-party certifications and assembly services reduce your downtime and simplify procurement. 
-Proven by leading industry players – Our solutions support major names across oil & gas, marine, terminals and high-tech manufacturing sectors. 

Guided by our core values of being Bold, Collaborative and Dependable, we continuously challenge ourselves to set higher standards and be the trusted partner that keeps your operations running safely and smoothly. 

Connect with us to discuss your hose, valve, fittings or pigging requirements – or visit flexy.com.my to explore our full range of solutions.

Jesteśmy jedynymi autoryzowanymi przedstawicielami firmy Jinan Senfeng Technology Co., Ltd. marka handlowa SENFENG LASER TECHNOLOGY. Firma ta jest jednym z największych producentów laserów światłowodowych na świecie. Dziś zatrudnia ponad 1000 pracowników produkcji, a jej dział badań i rozwoju liczy przeszło 100 specjalistów. Trzy linie produkcyjne znajdujące się 120000 metrach kwadratowych nowoczesnego warsztatu produkcyjnego które produkują rocznie ponad 5 tys. zaawansowanych technologicznie laserów światłowodowych. Wyroby SENFENG LASER TECHNOLOGY trafiają do odbiorców w Unii Europejskiej, Stanach Zjednoczonych, Rosji, Ameryce Południowej, Indiach czy na Bliskim Wschodzie.

SENFENG LASER TECHNOLOGY oferuje kilkadziesiąt modeli laserów, które sprawdziły się w przemyśle ciężkim jak i szeroko pojętym przemyśle lekkim. Urządzenia SENFENG LASER TECHNOLOGY produkowane są zgodnie z normami ISO9001 oraz ISO14001, posiadają też certyfikaty TUV CE i FDA.

Fabricast serves businesses in Saudi Arabia and throughout GCC with superior welding as well as cutting solutions.
We empower our clients with one-stop solutions, including rentals and used equipment that boosts productivity and quality while lowering costs. Welding equipment and consumables that we source from the top brands serve a wide range of industries such as Steel, Shipbuilding, Heavy Construction, Transport, Offshore, Energy, Repair & Maintenance in KSA.

Name: AOB Carretillas
Description:
A.O.B. Carretillas es una empresa especializada en la compra, venta y reparación de carretillas elevadoras. Con años de experiencia en el sector, nos hemos consolidado como una compañía de confianza para todos aquellos que necesitan soluciones eficientes y duraderas para el manejo de carga en sus operaciones. Nos dedicamos a ofrecer productos y servicios de alta calidad, garantizando la satisfacción de nuestros clientes a través de un equipo profesional y comprometido.

Contamos con una amplia variedad de carretillas elevadoras nuevas y usadas, adaptadas a las necesidades de cada tipo de industria. Además, nuestros servicios de reparación y mantenimiento están diseñados para prolongar la vida útil de las carretillas y asegurar su correcto funcionamiento, minimizando tiempos de inactividad y optimizando la productividad.

En A.O.B. Carretillas, nos destacamos por nuestra atención al cliente, por ofrecer soluciones a medida y por estar siempre a la vanguardia en tecnología y tendencias del sector.

Trabajamos Junto a Grupo Kion desde hace más de 4 años, somos distribuidores oficiales de Baoli, Linde y Still. Ofrecemos RENTING y FINANCIACIÓN ajustándonos siempre al cliente.

Name: Stepan GmbH
Description:
For over 50 years Stepan GmbH has attended to its client's concerns and provided them - together with their partners - with a wide range of machinery, materials and services in fields of its activity:

- PCB
- Electronic
- Printing technology
- Additive manufacturing
- Photovoltaic
- Transformer
- Automation
- Special applications

A long-standing experienced team consisting of sales, consulting, project management, service and support is always available. Contact us and let us work together to find the right solutions for your projects. 

Headquartered in Vienna Austria since 1968, Stepan GmbH has subsidiaries in Germany, Romania and Serbia, as well as sales offices in Hungary, Croatia and Slovenia.

Name: BARRIO EQUIPMENTS PVT LTD
Description:
At Barrio Equipments Pvt Ltd, our story goes beyond being a successful first-generation business. We're a vibrant and passionate community of people, built on a foundation of unwavering values, unshakeable faith and relentless innovation. As a thriving family, we're grounded in ethics, guided by humanism and fueled by passion, all driving us towards excellence in everything we do.

Having its corporate HQ at Faridabad (near Badarpur, New Delhi border) and a world-class warehouse at Gurgaon, BARRIO has been founded by Piush Goyal and Anant Goyal with the objective of supplying world-class Industrial and Construction Equipments. We cater to the customers from variety of Sectors, viz. – Manufacturing, Warehousing, Infrastructure, RMC, e-Commerce, Hospitals, Hotels and Power sector etc. We presently are the Authorized Dealer / Channel Partners for the various MNCs – Kirloskar Gensets, JCB / Eco Air HVLS Fans, FS Curtis Air Compressors, Chakr RECD Kits, ECONRG Dual Fuel Kits for Gensets, Dock Levelers and Dock Bumpers etc. for the whole of NCR and All India strategic customers. We promise to provide the best-in-class close and efficient service to our esteemed customers.

Piush is currently also the Member of CII Haryana State Council and MSME Committee for Northern India. He was previously the Co-Chairman of CII's Regional Committee for the Logistics & Warehousing and the Member of the CII’s National Steering Committee for EXCON Exhibitions since 2015. He is a strong brand manager (over 15,000 followers on LinkedIn, Key-Note Speaker at many events including CII and interviewed multiple number of times by the print media).

Name: CBMaq - Companhia Brasileira de Maquinas Ltda
Description:
CBMaq: Elevando Padrões no Mercado de Máquinas Pesadas

Desde sua fundação, a CBMaq – Companhia Brasileira de Máquina tem consolidado sua posição como referência multimarcas entre os Concessionários de Máquinas Pesadas em Brasília, Goiás e Tocantins. Com uma vasta experiência nos setores de construção civil, construção rodoviária e agronegócio, a empresa se destaca no segmento de venda de máquinas pesadas, tratores e grupos geradores de marcas nacionais e internacionais premiadas.

A CBMaq abraça os princípios fundamentais de qualidade, segurança e produtividade, reconhecendo sua importância para se destacar no exigente setor de máquinas pesadas.

Nossos produtos e serviços são amplamente reconhecidos no mercado por sua qualidade, resistência, produtividade e custos de reparo acessíveis. Como Concessionário de Máquinas Pesadas, a CBMaq é sinônimo de tecnologia avançada, desempenho excepcional e excelência em serviços de manutenção e reposição de peças. Contamos com uma estrutura própria de oficina especializada em pós-vendas, além de um extenso estoque de peças para sua máquina, com capacidade para mais de 10 mil itens, visando atingir uma taxa de pronto atendimento de 90%.

O atendimento de alto padrão proporcionado pela CBMaq é resultado de uma equipe competente e diversificada, abrangendo áreas como Administração, Finanças, Engenharia, Ciências Contábeis, Tecnologia da Informação e Recursos Humanos.

Reconhecida por uma carteira de  mais de 3.000 clientes, a empresa foi concebida com o propósito de desempenhar um papel significativo nas regiões de Goiás, Distrito Federal e Tocantins, mantendo o foco na expansão de sua presença no mercado nacional. Na CBMaq, elevamos os padrões para oferecer soluções excepcionais no universo de máquinas pesadas.

Name: Het Packhuys BV
Description:
Het Packhuys BV is leverancier van kwalitatief hoogwaardige doseersystemen, weegoplossingen, verpakkingsmachines en complete verpakkingslijnen voor de voedingsmiddelen verwerkende en verpakkende industrie. Hiervoor werken we nauw samen met onze vaste leveranciers waarvan we exclusief distributeur zijn voor de Benelux. Onze leveranciers zijn echte partners waarmee we samen met onze klanten een partnership opbouwen, gebaseerd op vertrouwen en een langdurige samenwerking.


Het Packhuys is een professioneel, innovatief en klantgericht bedrijf, met gedreven en enthousiaste medewerkers die allemaal streven naar het verlenen van service met een grote S. Dit realiseren we door een flexibele en oplossingsgerichte opstelling gecombineerd met een no-nonsense mentaliteit.

Het kunnen rekenen op verlening van professionele service is een zeer belangrijkere factor in elk productiebedrijf.  Ons team staat 7 dagen per week klaar om onze klanten telefonisch en/of ter plaatse te ondersteunen bij calamiteiten. Telefonisch proberen we eerst de storing in kaart te brengen, om waar mogelijk het probleem direct te verhelpen.

Name: Storm Equipment
Description:
Storm Equipment is what was formerly the Metal Pless division of Voigt Smith Innovation (VSI). 

The roots of Storm Equipment lie in our commercial snow and ice contracting company in Southern Minnesota. We purchased our first Metal Pless plow in 2016 off of a trade show floor and the rest is history.

We immediately recognized the efficiency benefits of a hydraulic wing plow as we were able to double our productivity per machine. One year later we updated the rest of our fleet to Metal Pless Live Edge plows and began distributing Metal Pless equipment throughout the USA. 

With physical locations in multiple states and knowledgeable staff we are here to support your Metal Pless journey from start to finish!

Name: OMC Power Equipment
Description:
Established in the early 1980's, OMC Power Equipment has been providing quality power equipment solutions to the civil, commercial and lifestyle markets across New Zealand for over 30 years.

Products include specialised mowing and landscaping machinery, compaction equipment, tracked dumpers and power barrows, lighting towers and generators (1 - 100kVA).

We specialise in custom solutions to our commercial & lifestyle clients and believe that quality is the most important aspect of any product.

Sourcing top class machinery from Italy, Japan, Germany, Australia and the USA, We are the New Zealand distributor of Weber MT Compaction Equipment, Canycom slope & brush mowers, Mean Green Electric Mowers, Scag Mowers, Cormidi Dumpers, Green Climber Mowers, Raymo Mowers and Trime Generators and Lighting Towers and more.

At OMC, we believe the best results come from the right gear, trusted support, and strong relationships.

Talk to our expert team today to find the right solution for your job, your property, or your business.

Bu tecrübe endüstriyel tesis ve makine konusunda sabittir. MinerALL  bu tecrübeyi kendi bilgi birikimi ile harmanlayıp yerüstü ve yeraltı maden makineleri ve sarf malzemeleri satışı konusunda ileriye taşımayı hedeflemektedir.

MinerALL, yurtdışında kendi sektöründe lider durumundaki firmaların temsilciliğini yapmaktadır. Makine, yedek parça ve sarf malzeme dışında servis ve danışmanlık hizmetleri de vermektedir.

Obrigado a todos pela confiança.

Name: Aljudaimi Equipment Co.
Description:
Since the establishment of Al-Judaimi Equipment Company in 2018, we have aimed to achieve significant milestones through our solution-focused mission and vision. To fulfill our founding mission and vision, we have forged strategic partnerships with leading global industry players across the sectors we operate in. These partnerships have enabled us to continuously provide innovative, high-quality products and services that add value to the regions we serve, all while maintaining an unwavering commitment to customer satisfaction.

Name: SAWS UK LIMITED
Description:
SAWS UK is one of the UK's leading bandsaw and circular saw machine manufacturers and bandsaw blade suppliers. We have a huge range of manual, semi-automatic and CNC saws, which include Doall, Carif, Macc, Bonetti, Simec and our own Alligator brand. We are the sole agents for many high quality European manufacturers, such as Meber, Rusch and Uzay. We are also a leading manufacturer of custom bandsaw machines and our engineers have provided bespoke solutions for a wide range of sectors and materials, including aluminium, steel and plastics.

Whether you need a bandsaw for engineering purposes or a tool room saw, our friendly and experienced team can advise you on the best saw for your needs.

Name: JUHOL s.r.o.
Description:
Jsme dynamická společnost se sídlem ve Zlíně, která se specializuje na technologickou podporu firem. Vyrábíme monolitní nástroje podle našich geometrií a zároveň dokážeme splnit požadavky při výrobě speciálních nástrojů pro zákazníka. 

Naše firma se specializuje na nabídku širokého sortimentu strojírenských nástrojů, které pomáhají našim zákazníkům dosáhnout excelence ve svých projektech. 

Snižujeme náklady na výrobu a snažíme se udržet české firmy ve špičce technologického průmyslu v Evropě.

Samozřejmostí pro naši společnost je systém managmentu kvality dle normy ČSN EN ISO 9001.

Name: Svetsmaskinservice AB

Svetsmaskinservice AB är ett av nordens största serviceföretag för den svetsande industrin. Företaget grundades redan 1963 och har sitt huvudsäte i Göteborg samt etablering i Uddevalla. Svetsmaskinservice AB har ca ett 40-tal anställda.
Vi har försäljning av svetsmaskiner och tillbehör, arbetskläder och skor och de mest avancerade strömkällor till robotsystem.
Vi erbjuder även uthyrning, reparation och service samt kör turbilar. Sedan 2015 erbjuder vi även arbetsutbildningar såsom; Heta Arbeten, truckutbildningar och specialistutbildningar inom svets.
Vi har också en välsorterad gasdepå för all sorts industri och övrig handel.
Välkommen till oss på Svetsmaskinservice!

Name: Maq-Euro SL
Description:
Maq-Euro is a Spanish company that buys and sells second-hand industrial machinery, specialising in machines for metal cutting (milling machines, boring machines, lathes, etc.) and sheet metal forming (shears, press brakes, rollers, etc.).
We are associated with one of Europe's largest buying and selling houses, located in England, with a long history of more than 61 years of experience in this sector. Most of the machines can be seen in our warehouses in Zaragoza, many others are located in the warehouses in England.
We also have a large team of technicians specialised in all fields related to machinery.
Our extensive contacts and sales worldwide, have led us to establish close relationships with
South America, Asia, Africa, the United States, etc., countries with which we are in constant contact by sending containers.
We also buy machinery for cash: from complete factories to single machines. If you have any surplus machine, especially if it is semi-new, do not hesitate to contact us.
Maq-Euro is a young and dynamic company, which at the same time has a wide and extensive experience in the machinery buying and selling sector.
Our aim is to always seek customer satisfaction.

Name: Performatec Australia
Description:
For us, service is everything.

Performatec is at the forefront of revolutionising the Australian manufacturing sector through our comprehensive range of CNC manufacturing machinery and exceptional before, during and after-sales service.

With a rich history of over two decades, Performatec has become a trusted name in the manufacturing sector. We provide exceptional support and reliability to a wide range of clients, from small businesses to large corporations across Australia.Our expertise extends to high-quality CNC machines, OEM / After-Market Spare parts, machinery maintenance, and specialised consultative sales. 

We take pride in our comprehensive after-sales care, including machine commissioning and installation, training, and servicing. Our team of fully-trained service technicians, strategically positioned nationwide, ensures that expert assistance is always within reach, demonstrating our commitment to your success.

As the sole Australian dealer for the renowned brand Flow Waterjet, we specialise in delivering top-tier waterjet cutting machines, consumables, and equipment solutions tailored specifically to the stone processing industry. Moreover, our curated range of Fiber Laser and Press Brake machinery from Baykal is designed to provide precision and quality, empowering your projects with unmatched accuracy and productivity.

At Performatec, we are more than just a supplier; we are your partner in success. Our proactive and thorough service approach elevates your operation from the first interaction to continuous post-purchase support. We are committed to fostering the growth and success of our client's operations, offering bespoke solutions that empower Australian manufacturing customers to achieve new heights of efficiency and productivity.

Join us in stepping into a world of endless possibilities, where every interaction adds value and efficiency to your business, minimising downtime and maximising productivity.

GONTEC e.K. founded in September 2015, based in Berlin, Germany, is your reliable and competent partner for all Europe, in water high pressure cleaning, industrial suction and accessories. GONTEC e.K. im September 2015 gegründet, mit Sitzt in Berlin, ist Ihre zuverlässige und kompetente Partner für Deutschland und ganz Europa im Wasserhöchstdruck, Industriesauger und Zubehör alle Art. Así mismo, la confianza que en nosotros han depositado marcas de primera línea, fabricantes de maquinaria y equipos para la industria del plástico, nos convierte en proveedores habituales de los principales transformadores españoles, no solo por la calidad y servicio de las marcas a las que representamos, sino por la garantía del contacto directo y permanente que mantenemos con nuestros clientes para cualquier necesidad que se presente, sin tener que recurrir al fabricante original.

Conciencia Ecológica, Conocedores de la cadena de valor del Plástico, Hacia la Economía Circular, frases que definen nuestra labor enfocada a Rentabilizar todos los recursos de nuestros clientes.

Name: YUNTES MAKİNE A.Ş
Description:
Yuntes Makine A.Ş 1996 yılında sanayi sektörüne kaliteli hizmet ve teknik servis verme konusunda öncü firma olmak hedefiyle Konya' da kurulmuştur.
Yuntes Makine dünyaca ünlü, alanında uzmanlaşmış birçok firmanın distribütörlüğünü alarak kalitesinden ve hizmetinden ödün vermemiştir. Bu tavrıyla başarısından söz ettirerek ilerleyen Yuntes Makine, Konya haricinde diğer bölgelerde de hızlı ve kaliteli hizmet verebilmek adına Ankara, İzmir, İstanbul, Bursa, Mersin Serbest Bölge olarak farklı illerde şubeler açmıştır. Aynı zamanda şubelerimizde satış mühendisleri ve satış sonrası servis mühendislerine yer verilmiştir. 
Ayrıca Türkiye’nin ender forklift üreticilerinden biri olan Spartek  Makine; Yerli ve Milli anlayışıyla ürettiği forkliftleri Dolphin markasıyla Türkiye’ nin yanı sıra dünya pazarına sunmaktadır.

Yuntes Makine A.Ş was established in Konya in 1996 with the aim of being the leading company in providing quality and technical service to the industrial sector.
Yuntes Makine has not compromised on its quality and service by getting the distributorship of many world-renowned companies specialized in their fields. Progressing by making a name for its success with this attitude, Yuntes Makine has opened branches in different provinces such as Ankara, İzmir, İstanbul, Bursa, Mersin Free Zone in order to provide fast and quality service in other regions besides Konya. At the same time, sales engineers and after-sales service engineers are included in our branches.
In addition, Spartek Makine, one of the rare forklift manufacturers in Turkey; offers forklifts produced with a domestic and national understanding to the world market as well as Turkey with the Dolphin brand.

Name: Santor Group
Description:
Santor Group is a diversified business group with operations across three sectors: heavy machinery (Sarantopoulos S.A.), construction (Domotechniki), and hospitality (Searocks S.A.).

Our journey began in 1972 with the founding of Sarantopoulos S.A., which became one of Greece’s most trusted names in heavy machinery. Since then, we’ve grown through exclusive partnerships with leading global manufacturers, serving clients in both the public and private sectors.

In 1988, we entered construction with Domotechniki, and in 2018, expanded into hospitality with the launch of Searocks S.A. In 2025, we evolved into Santor Group — a new name reflecting over 50 years of expertise, certified quality, and a forward-looking spirit of innovation.

Name: Smitma
Description:
Smitma B.V. is one of the leading suppliers of high quality used and unused earthmoving machinery and road equipment worldwide. From our office and yard in Venlo, we provide our clients with the best solution for their needs in heavy equipment.

Smitma was founded in 1968 as a contractor and machinery repair shop. In those days we already sold our own used equipment and started to trade, mostly in used bulldozers. Because of the increasing demand in used machinery we have stopped our contracting work in the mid 70’s to focus on the machinery business. From the beginnings we have always been developing our ways of doing business and we have been listing to our clients to deliver the machines they needed.

With 29 members of staff to clean, service, repair, commercialize and arrange logistics & customs, we sell about 500 machines a year all over the globe. We have about 100 machines in stock like excavators, articulated and rigid dump trucks, dozers, motor graders, wheel loaders, compactors, asphalt pavers, Cold milling machines and over 400 parts/attachments available such as Front blades, Grapples, Rippers and Buckets from premium brands. 

We mostly sell brands as Caterpillar, Komatsu, Volvo, Wirtgen, Hitachi, Hyundai, Vögele, Dynapac, Bomag and Hamm.

By actively thinking together with the client, our experts look for ergonomic solutions that enables us to serve the customer to the fullest. Meanwhile, we create a unique range of products where the highest quality and safety are of utmost importance.
As an expert in industrial, ergonomic solutions, we want to achieve brand recognition with every Belgian organisation that is motivated to create a high quality, ergonomic work environment to safeguard the wellbeing of the employees. 
Apart from that, our ergonomic solutions contribute to lesser absence of employees and higher productivity by physically relieving the employees. The production process is more efficient and the workforce can be used more flexibly due to the user-friendliness of our solutions. 
Are we talking about electric rotating solutions, vacuum lifting systems or hydraulic tilting applications? Logitrans is thé partner for you.
www.logitrans-handling.be

Name: Jekko Deutschland GmbH
Description:
Jekko Deutschland – Innovative Hebetechnik mit italienischen Wurzeln.

Jekko steht weltweit für über 50 Jahre Erfahrung in der Entwicklung und Fertigung von kompakten Minikranen, Spezialkranen und Hebetechnik-Zubehör. Unsere Marke vereint italienische Ingenieurskunst, innovative Lösungen und höchste Qualität, um selbst anspruchsvollste Hebeaufgaben auf engstem Raum sicher zu meistern.

Was 1972 als kleiner Metallbauer begann, entwickelte sich zu einem international führenden Hersteller für Minikrane. Heute ist Jekko in über 30 Ländern vertreten – mit einem starken Händlernetzwerk auf allen Kontinenten. Unser Anspruch: Immer einen Schritt voraus zu sein, Trends früh zu erkennen und Innovationen erfolgreich in den Markt zu bringen.

Jekko Deutschland ist Teil dieser Erfolgsgeschichte. Als offizielle Vertretung von Jekko Italien in der DACH-Region sind wir die Verbindung zwischen Hersteller, autorisierten Händlern und Kunden. Wir unterstützen den Vertrieb, organisieren Vorführungen und Schulungen, koordinieren Serviceeinsätze und sichern so den Erfolg unserer Partner vor Ort.

Mit unserem Engagement stärken wir das Händlernetzwerk, treiben Innovationen wie Robotik und Assistenzsysteme voran und sorgen dafür, dass Jekko-Lösungen zuverlässig und sicher im Einsatz sind – egal ob auf engen Baustellen, bei Glasmontagen oder Spezialanwendungen.

Jekko Deutschland – Kompakt. Präzise. Immer einen Schritt voraus.

Name: DGService & DGTech
Description:
DG Service è un'azienda che, da oltre 15 anni, si occupa di servizi di assistenza tecnica per impianti di lavorazione dei metalli, dal taglio laser alle segatrici di BLM Group.

Il suo spin-off DG Tech nasce per gestire l'acquisto, la revisione e la vendita di impianti revisionati di BLM Group.

DGTech, appartenente allo stesso gruppo aziendale, si occupa dell'acquisto, revisione e rivendita di impianti industriali a marchio BLM Group, in qualità di partner ufficiale dello stesso gruppo.  

La nostra mission è quella di essere prima di tutto un gruppo di persone, accomunate dagli stessi valori e passioni: l'interesse per l'avanguardia tecnologica, la voglia di imparare e di rimanere sempre aggiornati rispetto ai cambiamenti, e la ricerca costante per garantire ai nostri clienti il massimo supporto e professionalità.

I NOSTRI VALORI

La nostra filosofia è da sempre "Growing Together": ogni persona ricopre un ruolo fondamentale per il raggiungimento del successo della nostra attività e ci impegniamo per garantire che questo principio sia perseguito, a tutti i livelli, in ogni scelta aziendale. 

Nel corso degli anni, grazie alla stima e alla fiducia dei nostri clienti, unite alla nostra volontà di offrire servizi sempre più puntuali ed orientati ai bisogni del mercato, abbiamo seguito un percorso di continuo sviluppo dell'offerta. 

Dal 2012 la nostra sede si trova a Concorezzo: collocazione non casuale, vicino ai principali snodi autostradali, pensata strategicamente per offrire ai clienti un servizio tempestivo, puntuale e facilmente raggiungibile. 

IL NOSTRO IMPEGNO

Grazie alla nostra squadra di tecnici specializzati, possiamo garantire la massima efficienza al tuo impianto: assistenza completa, manutenzione preventiva, corsi di formazione dedicati al personale dei nostri clienti, aggiornamento continuo del nostro staff. 
Tutto con lo stesso entusiasmo, rigore e serietà professionale che ci contraddistingue al fianco dei nostri partner.

Visión
Mantener nuestro liderazgo en proveer soluciones técnicas de vanguardia a nuestros clientes, presentes en los sectores agrícola, agroindustrial, construcción, comercio e industria, permitiendo establecer con ello relaciones de mutuo beneficio y a largo plazo.

 

Valores
Ética e Integridad, Responsabilidad Social, Sostenibilidad Ambiental, Solidaridad, Confiabilidad, Espíritu de Servicio y permanente actualización técnica de nuestro personal.


Compromiso
Orientación a resultados basados en la planificación, trabajo, responsabilidad, disciplina y mejora continua.

Estabilidad
Libertad de pensamiento, equidad y valoración del trabajo.

Interés por el cliente
Interés por satisfacer las necesidades y expectativas de los clientes.

Responsabilidad social
Transparencia en todos los aspectos de la organización en correspondencia con todas las partes interesadas.

Solidaridad

Name: DFI INTERNATIONAL
Description:
DFI International est un importateur et exportateur privilégié pour les professionnels de l’industrie. Forts de plus de 25 ans d’expérience dans le domaine du roulement, des solutions de convoyage et des solutions d’étanchéité, nous fournissons des produits industriels de haute qualité pour répondre aux besoins spécifiques de chaque secteur.

Nous nous engageons à offrir des solutions innovantes et durables qui permettent à nos clients d’optimiser la performance, la fiabilité et la durée de vie de leurs installations industrielles. En tant que partenaire de confiance, DFI International garantit une qualité irréprochable en collaborant avec les meilleures marques mondiales telles que SKF, DUNLOP, Freudenberg Sealing Technologies, NSK, COOPER, REVEYRON et OPTIBELT.

Notre expertise repose sur une parfaite maîtrise des technologies de pointe et des processus logistiques efficaces. Nous offrons des solutions complètes adaptées aux exigences spécifiques de chaque secteur, qu’il s’agisse de réduire les coûts d'entretien ou d'améliorer la productivité et la sécurité.

Nos roulements, solutions de convoyage et systèmes d'étanchéité sont conçus pour répondre aux défis les plus complexes, qu’ils concernent la réduction des frictions, l’optimisation des processus de production ou la protection des équipements contre l’usure et les contaminations externes.

Chez DFI International, chaque projet bénéficie d’une approche personnalisée, avec un suivi dédié à chaque étape : de l’analyse des besoins à la mise en œuvre des solutions, en passant par le choix des produits les plus adaptés. Nous nous engageons à fournir des solutions sur mesure qui maximisent la productivité tout en garantissant la durabilité et la fiabilité des installations.

Choisir DFI International, c’est opter pour un partenaire qui allie expertise, fiabilité et innovation pour accompagner le développement industriel de nos clients à long terme.

Name: Falcor Group
Description:
In Falcor Group supportiamo le aziende nella gestione dei rifiuti con soluzioni che riducono i volumi, abbassano i costi e liberano spazio. Forniamo presse e compattatori di alta qualità per migliorare la logistica interna, semplificare il lavoro degli operatori e contribuire a una gestione più efficiente e sostenibile degli scarti. 
Ma non ci limitiamo a vendere macchine: progettiamo impianti su misura, costruiti attorno alle reali esigenze del cliente. Effettuiamo sopralluoghi, analizziamo i flussi di rifiuto e integriamo diverse tecnologie per offrire soluzioni complete, pensate per ottimizzare i processi e generare un risparmio economico concreto.
Abbiamo scelto i principali produttori europei (Bramidan A/S, Presto GmbH, Runi A/S), per offrire una gamma completa di macchine pensate per ridurre in modo drastico il volume dei rifiuti: presse verticali e orizzontali, compattatori scarrabili, presse a coclea, per polistirolo e strizzatrici (dewatering), compostiere, trituratori per il vetro e altre soluzioni.
Chi sceglie Falcor può contare su un servizio completo: dall’installazione alla formazione, fino alla manutenzione programmata e al supporto post-vendita. Le nostre soluzioni possono includere sistemi di monitoraggio e analisi da remoto, per un controllo continuo e intelligente dell’impianto.
Falcor è il partner ideale per trasformare la gestione dei rifiuti in un’opportunità di efficienza, risparmio e rispetto per l’ambiente.

Nos services comprennent :
-L’extraction de fumée de soudure (systèmes d’aspiration et de filtration des fumées pour protéger les travailleurs des particules nocives)
-Le dépoussiérage industriel (pour divers procédés générant de la poussière)
-L’extraction de gaz d’échappement (dispositif fixe ou mobile pour capter et rejeter les gaz émis par les véhicules et engin à moteur)
-La ventilation industrielle (ventilateurs et systèmes de ventilation pour assurer un renouvellement d’air efficace)

Depuis toujours, nous nous engageons à améliorer la qualité de l’air dans les espaces de travail en offrant des solutions performantes et ergonomiques.
Chez Expair, nous plaçons la satisfaction de nos clients au centre de notre activité, en proposant des produits adaptés aux besoins spécifiques des divers secteurs industriels tels que l’automobile, l’aéronautique, la métallurgie, l’électronique, la plasturgie, les laboratoires, les ateliers municipaux et atelier de restauration.

 Staramy się zapewnić naszym klientom produkty najlepszej jakości, w dobrej cenie, oraz obsługi na najwyższym poziomie.

 Oferowane przez nas produkty są rozwiązaniem na najczęstsze problemy występujące w obsłudze materiałów sypkich w procesie produkcyjnym.

Name: PHENIX FGT
Description:
Bienvenue sur la page officielle de PHENIX FGT, un leader innovant dans le domaine de la ventilation réfrigérée des grains et de l'échantillonnage des camions céréaliers. Fondée avec la vision de révolutionner la conservation et le contrôle qualité dans l'industrie agroalimentaire, nous nous engageons à fournir des solutions qui garantissent la fraîcheur, la sécurité et la durabilité.

Avec plus d'une décennie d'expérience, PHENIX FGT se démarque par sa capacité à offrir des technologies de pointe et des services sur mesure qui répondent aux besoins spécifiques de nos clients. Notre mission est d'améliorer constamment les méthodes de stockage des grains, en veillant à ce que chaque grain conserve sa qualité optimale du champ au consommateur.

Nos solutions de ventilation réfrigérée représentent le cœur de notre offre, permettant une gestion efficace de la température et de l'humidité des grains stockés, réduisant considérablement les risques de détérioration et de perte. Notre système de prélèvement d’échantillons précis et fiable garantit une transparence maximale et le respect des normes de qualité les plus élevées.

PHENIX FGT est plus qu'un fournisseur de technologie ; est un partenaire stratégique qui comprend les défis du secteur agroalimentaire et travaille aux côtés de ses clients pour les relever. Notre équipe d'ingénieurs en mécanique, experts en informatique, mécanique et électronique, est engagée dans une recherche et un développement continus, visant l'excellence et l'innovation constante.

La durabilité est au cœur de notre philosophie d'entreprise. Nous nous engageons à réduire l'impact environnemental de nos opérations et de nos produits en promouvant des pratiques de travail respectueuses de l'environnement et contribuant à un avenir plus vert et plus durable pour le secteur agricole.

Suivez-nous sur LinkedIn pour rester informé de nos dernières innovations, projets et réussites. Avec PHENIX FGT, l’agriculture rencontre l’innovation pour un avenir

Name: Backpartner GmbH
Description:
Wir bieten unseren Kunden für sie zugeschnittene und optimierte Lösungen. Dabei berücksichtigen wir technische und qualitative Gesichtspunkte genauso wie auch ein gutes Preis-/Leistungsverhältnis.

Wir hören unseren Kunden genau zu und analysieren ihre Wünsche und Belange sowie die maßgeblichen Prozessparameter.
Wir reden niemandem nach dem Mund und legen unsere Ideen offen auf den Tisch. Wir freuen uns, wenn daraus in der Diskussion tragfähige Lösungen entstehen und wir mit unseren Dienstleistungen und Maschinen einen Mehrwert für unsere Kunden und ihre Backprodukte schaffen können.

Im Mittelpunkt stehen stets die Produkte und Wünsche unserer Kunden. Ziel ist es dabei gemeinsam auf offene, transparente und ehrliche Art und Weise zum besten Ergebnis zu gelangen. Werte wie Qualität, Verlässlichkeit und Partnerschaft haben bei uns einen sehr hohen Stellenwert. Das ist unser Anspruch – nehmen Sie uns beim Wort.

Name: CENTERFRIOS
Description:
Na CENTERFRIOS, somos especialistas em oferecer soluções inovadoras e de alta qualidade em refrigeração, armazenagem, pesagem e equipamentos de gastronomia. Com mais de 27 anos de experiência, atendemos segmentos como supermercados, padarias, pizzarias, restaurantes, lanchonetes, confeitarias, escolas, hospitais e outros estabelecimentos de gastronomia.

Missão
Fornecer equipamentos de alta qualidade que superem as expectativas dos nossos clientes, melhorando a eficiência operacional e reduzindo custos. Contribuindo para o crescimento dos nossos clientes. E nos empenhamos, ao máximo, para que possamos contribuir também com o crescimento do nosso Time.

Visão
Ser a empresa líder e referência em soluções de refrigeração e equipamentos de gastronomia em nossa região, reconhecida pela inovação contínua, qualidade excepcional e atendimento ao cliente de excelência.

Valores
- Compromisso com a Satisfação do Cliente: Exceder as expectativas de nossos clientes.
- Inovação Contínua: Buscar constantemente novas tecnologias e métodos.
- Qualidade e Excelência: Manter rigorosos padrões de qualidade.
- Parcerias Estratégicas: Cultivar parcerias de longo prazo que agreguem valor.
- Sustentabilidade: Promover práticas que favoreçam a eficiência energética e a sustentabilidade ambiental.

Acreditamos que nosso sucesso está diretamente ligado ao sucesso dos nossos clientes. É por isso que nos dedicamos a fornecer soluções que realmente fazem a diferença no dia a dia dos negócios.

Name: Homola - autoservisná technika
Description:
Naša moderná a dynamická spoločnosť Homola, s. r. o. ponúka na slovenskom trhu tie najnovšie technológie už vyše 30 rokov. Od roku 1990 sme vyrástli, dospeli a stali sa stabilným hráčom, ako aj silnou konkurenciou v oblasti autoservisnej techniky. 

Vďaka usilovnosti, odhodlaniu a kvalite našich produktov i služieb sa nám podarilo získať množstvo zaujímavých klientov. Môžeme sa pochváliť spoluprácou so značkovými servismi, importérmi zahraničných vozidiel, spoločnosťou SLOVDEKRA, prevádzkovateľmi liniek STK a mnohými ďalšími významnými partnermi v automobilovej doprave. Dosiahnuť takú vysokú spokojnosť zo strany zákazníkov by však nebolo možné bez našich špičkových dodávateľov. Vybrali sme si tú najlepšiu kvalitu a s firmami spolupracujeme už 20 rokov. Naša spolupráca tak stojí na vzájomnej dôvere a priateľských vzťahoch. 

Osvedčených dodávateľov síce nemeníme, ale na modernizáciu a prospešné zmeny kladieme dôraz v iných sférach. V roku 2002 sme získali certifikát kvality podľa normy ISO 9001:2000 a naši zamestnanci každoročne absolvujú niekoľko interných i zahraničných školení. Okrem toho školíme tiež zákazníkov, študentov a učňov odborných škôl a učilíšť. Investície do rozvoja a vzdelávania zamestnancov sa nám však niekoľkonásobne vracajú. Veľa z nich pracuje v našej spoločnosti už od jej založenia a my sa na nich môžeme 100 % spoľahnúť.

Získali sme aj medzinárodný certifikát SNAS pre kalibračné laboratóriá, a tým sme sa stali autorizovaným a akreditovaným laboratóriom na Slovensku. V roku 2019 sa napriek náročnej zmene zákonov všetci naši pracovníci úspešne certifikovali pre výkon kalibrácií na staniciach STK. 

Spokojnosť našich klientov rovnako ako ich dôvera v rodinnú firmu Homola nás poháňa vpred a dodáva nám silu a motiváciu na to, aby sme aj naďalej poskytovali čoraz kvalitnejšie servisné služby a produkty. Pod naše krídla patrí aj značka Homola Medical - laboratóriá pre medicínsku techniku a predaj.

Name: BOSKY
Description:
BOSKY to firma o ugruntowanej pozycji w branży opakowań, szczególnie dla przemysłu spożywczego. Od ponad 25 lat doskonalimy naszą ofertę w zakresie automatyzacji procesu pakowania: dostarczamy pojedyncze maszyny i urządzenia, projektujemy i wdrażamy kompletne linie do pakowania, zapewniamy profesjonalne doradztwo. Pomagamy w dokonywaniu właściwego zakupu, za priorytet uznając indywidualne potrzeby oraz możliwości Kupujących, przy uwzględnieniu specyfiki rynku i bieżących trendów.

Nasza misja opiera się na przekonaniu, że opakowanie produktu, oprócz spełniania funkcji ochronnej, musi spełniać szereg wymagań zależnych od potrzeb konsumentów i od pozycjonowania produktu na rynku. Opakowanie utrzymuje świeżość towaru, stanowi jednocześnie jego reklamę, jest elementem promocji firmy, kształtuje jej postrzeganie. Dlatego BOSKY swoją ofertę opiera na najnowszych technologiach i wprowadza innowacje nie tylko dla samych opakowań, ale również w procesy pracy. Zarówno bezpieczeństwo jak i wygodna organizacja są naszym zdaniem ważnym kryterium w projektowaniu linii pakujących.

Strategię BOSKY charakteryzuje dążenie do budowania partnerskiej relacji z Klientem, opartej na zaufaniu i służącej długotrwałej współpracy, tak aby korzyści wypływające z kompleksowej obsługi przynosiły miarodajne i długotrwałe efekty. Zadowolenie Klientów, zarówno z proponowanych systemów, opakowań, jak i ze świadczonych usług, jest i zawsze będzie naszym kluczowym celem. Dlatego też w trosce o redukcję kosztów procesu pakowania, wyszukujemy rozwiązania optymalne zarówno pod kątem funkcjonalności, wzornictwa, jak i ceny.

Name: Awutek Oy
Description:
Awutek Oy was founded in 1976 by Erik and Iris Torkko. Their aim was to create a company offering high-quality machinery and services to companies operating in the field of wood processing. After beginning operations in Masku, the company moved into larger facilities in Raisio.
Because the goal of Awutek is to provide customers with as versatile a service possible with high-quality products, the company has been required to grow according to the needs of the customers. In 1996 a new building was finished, the purpose of which was to gain more adequate facilities to display and repair our used machinery. Used machinery is inspected and fully repaired before sending to the customer. We want to show our customers that their satisfaction and trust is just as important to us regarding the used machinery as well as the new.

At the beginning of 2006 the new building was completed, the purpose of it was to increasing the effectiveness of operations. The new facilities includes a display area where customers can familiarize themselves with the newest products. Some of these products are on standby for woodworking. This way our customers can instantly gain a better understanding of the workings of our machines. The new facilities are also better cater for training and negotiation needs.

Med noga utvalda leverantörer och många års erfarenhet av branschen har vi på byggt upp ett komplett filtersortiment till industri, kompressorer, vakuumpumpar, samt både mobila och stationära maskiner/fordon. Vi lägger stor vikt i att vara våra kunder behjälpliga ute på fältet och att fortsatt bibehålla en hög kunskapsnivå hos vår personal genom utbildningar, mässor och seminarier. Vi på MIAS Filter jobbar i nära samarbete med våra leverantörer och vi ser gärna även att deras spetskompetens kommer till nytta hos våra kunder.

MIAS Group AB är en del av Axel Johnson International,
en global industrigrupp som förvärvar och utvecklar teknikföretag inom strategiskt utvalda nischmarknader. Fokus ligger på bolag som erbjuder tekniska komponenter och lösningar till industriella processer.

Description:
Vår grundidé; att låta begagnade kvalitetsmaskiner fylla nya behov.
Maskiner, nyttofordon och verktyg ses ofta som produktkategorier inom den linjära ekonomin; de tillverkas, används ett tag och hamnar sedan i förvaring för att till slut kasseras. Vi på Maskinera vill förändra det tankesättet. Kvalitetsmaskiner konstrueras för att hålla i många år och kan enkelt cirkuleras. När en ägare inte längre har behov av en maskin kan nästa ägare ta över. Och nästa. Och nästa. Och nästa. Och ibland även nästa.

En marknadsplats som får snurr på den svenska maskinflottan
Grunden till maskinera bygger på expertis och nyfikenhet kring maskiner och kvalitet. Genom vår marknadsplats möjliggör vi att produkterna hamnar i rätt händer när de inte längre används. Vi får snurr på de maskiner som redan är producerade och inkörda som ett alternativ till nyproducerat. Snällare mot kassan och klimatet helt enkelt.

Varje Maskinera-annons gör skillnad
En nollställd distansmätare, motorgaranti, skyddsplast på displayen och doften av nytt. Vi vet – det är härligt. Men i en tid när nya maskiner blir alltmer lättillgängliga så är vår roll att stå för ett mer hållbart handlande viktigare än någonsin. Vi väljer kompletta servicehandböcker och känslan av att kunna göra en bra deal framför att köpa nytt! När du använder, underhåller och servar dina maskiner så maximeras din investering, både sett till andrahandsvärdet och klimatavtrycket.

“Miljövänligt och motorstarkt behöver inte vara motsatser när du handlar begagnat.”
Johan Toresson, Grundare Maskinera

Name: Express Weldcare Services Ltd (EWS)
Description:
Your Partner in Welding & Industrial Supplies, Repair, & Automation

Express Weldcare Services (EWS) is a leading distributor of welding and industrial supplies, providing comprehensive solutions to professionals across the UK. We are your one-stop-shop for everything you need to get the job done right, safely, and efficiently.

Our extensive product catalog includes a wide range of top-of-the-line welding machines, generators, and PPE (Personal Protective Equipment). We are also a trusted supplier of welding consumables and industrial gas, including popular choices like MIG welding, TIG welding, and stick welding equipment and supplies.

Beyond welding supplies, we specialise in a suite of expert services to keep your operations running smoothly. Our team of skilled technicians offers professional welding machine and generator repair, as well as precise calibrations to ensure optimal performance and compliance. We also provide critical gas safety checks, maintain gas manifolds, and perform LEV (Local Exhaust Ventilation) installations and inspections to prioritise a safe working environment.

Looking to boost productivity? Our expertise in welding automation can help you streamline your processes and improve quality. We also offer a range of reliable equipment hire options to meet your project's short-term needs.

At EWS, we're more than just a supplier; we're a partner dedicated to your success. With a focus on quality products, expert services, and unwavering customer support, we are committed to being the trusted name in welding supplies and services for the industrial and manufacturing sectors.

Name: Nomaco GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
2007 Founding of NOMACO oHG

In November 2007 NOMACO oHG started working as an agency for selling new machines and complete lines to the nonwoven industry, at that time mainly in german spoken countries. From the beginning it was always highest priority to provide perfect customer service and real customized solutions for our clients.

20101 Reforming the company into NOMACO GmbH & Co. KG

Early 2011 the company was restructed and new buisness segments were added. First of all buying and selling used textile machines and lines for the nonwoven industry.
Futhermore the services were enhanced. For concepts of new production lines a large protfolio of used machines can be used and in combination with new machines we are able to create the best solution for our customers in regards of the demand and the budget.

Our business were extended to new markets, which makes NOMACO GmbH & Co. KG to a global active company.

Beginning of the 2013 new employees have been hired and the field of production layout design and machine construction were added to the portfolio of NOMACO GmbH & Co. KG. Also a machine construction engineer is now part of the team and the company invested in CAD software and hardware.

Name: Intrak
Description:
In 1963 vindt de oprichting van Intrak in Weert plaats. Intrak profileert zich als het moderne toonaangevende bedrijf in de provincie Limburg en is een belangrijke toeleverancier voor de agrarische en cultuurtechnische sector. In 1989 opent Intrak een filiaal in Voerendaal.

Het brede leveringsprogramma met meerdere importeur- en dealerschappen wordt in de jaren negentig omgezet in een fullliner-relatie met hoofdleverancier New Holland.

Intrak concentreert zich op de levering aan bedrijven in de agrarische en cultuurtechnische sector. Er ontstaat een innovatieve, fullservice, technical supplier die het gehele programma van mechanisatie en diensten voor haar afnemers regisseert en uitvoert. Het beleid is erop gericht de afnemers van dienst te zijn met een compleet programma aan hoogwaardige techniek, gekoppeld aan een optimale dienstverlening. Deze dienstverlening voorziet onder meer in een adviesfunctie en een technische dienst die erop is ingesteld ad hoc te reageren, tot en met een compleet pakket aan financiële diensten.

Intrak investeert voortdurend in haar medewerkers en koppelt daarmee kennis aan ervaring. Voor elke klant streeft Intrak naar een optimale verhouding tussen voordeel, compleetheid, prestatie, service, openheid en betrouwbaarheid; met andere woorden: een goed partnership.

 

Company profile
Intrak was founded in Weert in 1963. Intrak presents itself as the modern and leading company of the southern province of Limburg and is an important supplier for the agricultural and cultural technical sector. In 1989 Intrak opens its branch in Voerendaal also in the south of the Netherlands.

The broad supply program that consisted of different importers - and dealerships was converted into a full-liner relationship with the main supplier New Holland in the nineties.

Intrak is focusing on supplying companies in the agricultural and groundscare sector. As an innovative full-service technical supplier, the organization manages the complete program of mechanization and services for its customers. The policy of the organization aims to satisfy the customer's wishes by offering high-quality techniques together with an optimal service. This service provides professional advices and technical support, which is set up to react ad hoc, as well as a complete package of financial services.

Intrak is constantly investing in training it's staff and therefore combines knowledge with experience. For each customer Intrak tries to find the best combination between value, completeness, performance, service, openness and reliability. In other words: a good partnership.

Name: Dopak
Description:
For nearly 30 years, Dopak has been supporting the plastics processing industry with its expertise, providing comprehensive support at every stage – from the design of injection molding facilities and installation of complete technological lines to service, repairs, and the sale of spare parts, as well as long-term cooperation and a range of additional services. The company's assortment includes hydraulic and electric injection molding machines, peripheral devices (dryers, loaders, conveyors, dispensers, bins, conveyors), recycling lines, robots, cooling systems, blow molding machines, and central feeding and drying systems. A new addition to the company's offerings is injection molds. 

A base of verified and renowned manufacturers of peripheral machinery, such as KraussMaffei, ONI, BBM, Digicolor, MO.DI.TEC, and Roth, guarantees excellent quality and project success. In addition to a wide range of new processing machines and equipment,

 Dopak also sells used injection molding machines. This activity is carried out under the PIMM brand. 

Dopak also runs a Research and Development Center in Wrocław, where it provides training services in plastics processing, machine operation and programming, as well as a Licensed Injection Molding Machine Operator Course. At the Center, clients also receive support in the technological development of new products and the improvement of molded and composite products. The Center also enables the production of test and pilot products on advanced automatic lines with clamping forces ranging from 500 to 5500 kN. Complementing Dopak's offerings is an online store: eshop.dopak.pl, which provides spare parts for machines and technical chemicals.

Our websites: 
Main Dopak website: http://www.dopak.pl/ - Dopak E-shop: https://eshop.dopak.pl/ 
Used machines: https://pimm.pl/pl/

Description:

Description:
MAWI is a trusted European company specializing in the sale and distribution of used machinery for the poultry industry and equipment for the broader food processing sector. With many years of experience, we have built a solid reputation for reliability, technical expertise, and a deep understanding of our clients’ operational needs.

Our portfolio includes a comprehensive selection of high-quality machines from the world’s leading manufacturers such as MAREL, MEYN, LINCO, BAADER, MULTIVAC, SEALPAC, ULMA, REEPACK, GEA, TIROMAT, VEMAG, HANDTMANN, and many others. Every machine offered by MAWI undergoes a detailed inspection, testing, and preparation process before delivery to ensure it meets the highest standards of hygiene, safety, and performance demanded in modern food production.

We understand that every production plant has its own specific requirements. That is why MAWI not only supplies equipment but also offers technical support, consulting, and customized solutions tailored to each client’s process layout, production volume, and budget. Our goal is to help customers increase productivity, reduce downtime, and extend the life cycle of their equipment.

At MAWI, we believe in transparency and long-term cooperation. Our clients can count on us at every stage — from selecting the right equipment and arranging transport, to installation support and after-sales service.

We also invite you to visit our YouTube channel, where we regularly present our machines in operation, showcase refurbished systems, and share practical insights from the poultry and food industries:

 www.youtube.com/@E-mawi./featured

MAWI continues to grow dynamically, driven by innovation, quality, and the trust of our partners across Europe.

Agrimac SA, with branches in Greece, specializes in the design, production, and distribution of agricultural, construction and forestry machinery. Combining artisanal craftsmanship with industrial innovation and material expertise, Agrimac SA ensures quality and high performance in every machine.

Our mission is to design and deliver reliable, high-quality machinery that meets safety and technological standards, thanks to the professionalism of the Agrimac SA team.

We aim to offer efficiency, safety, and involvement to those passionate about agriculture, while staying closely connected with our customers to continually update our products based on their needs.

Innovation and research drive our development. Agrimac SA uses high-quality materials from leading suppliers and ensures rigorous quality control throughout production.

With a global presence, Agrimac SA maintains customer trust through efficient distribution and a logistics system that tracks products from production to packaging. Our future rests on continuing to deliver exceptional quality worldwide.

Rådgivningsrollen stiller naturligvis store krav til os om knowhow, indsigt i branchen og evne til at sætte os i kundens sted, og det stiller store krav til kvaliteten af vore produkter og ikke mindst til god kundeservice. Name: HI-FLEX ITALIA
Description:
Fondata nel 1995 ad Arezzo, Hi-flex Italia è diventata in pochi anni un punto di riferimento nel settore dei tubi e dei raccordi per le applicazioni ad alta ed altissima pressione.
La preparazione tecnica della forza vendita, l'affidabilità del servizio clienti e la prontezza nella gestione degli ordini hanno fatto meritare ad Hi-flex Italia la fiducia dei migliori costruttori mondiali di soluzioni per l'oleodinamica, quali: il marchio storico Dunlop Hiflex, la francese Techmaflex, l'italiana DNP, delle quali l'azienda cura la distribuzione in esclusiva per il mercato italiano e l'americana SPX Power Team per la quale è diventata un importante caposaldo nello scenario nazionale.
La gamma Hi-flex Italia comprende: tutte le linee di tubi oleodinamici e termoplastici Dunlop Hiflex per la gestione del passaggio dei fluidi in ogni situazione ambientale (dall'acqua marina al fuoco); i tubi in Teflon originale DuPont di Kongsberg Automotive; le attrezzature idrauliche SPX Power Team per la gestione dell'altissima pressione (pompe, cilindri, centraline); gli innesti rapidi per applicazioni fluidodinamiche DNP;  i manometri e i termometri Wika, le macchine di assemblaggio dei tubi flessibili idraulici, l'aggraffatura dei tubi industriali, la formatura dei tubi e la calibrazione per il settore automotive Techmaflex. Completano l'offerta i tubi metallici, i compensatori di dilatazione, nonché una serie di accessori in grado di velocizzare il processo di supply management.
L'estensione dell'offerta e la costante crescita che hanno contraddistinto gli ultimi anni, fanno oggi di Hi-flex Italia un leader nella fornitura di soluzioni oleodinamiche di alta gamma per tutti i settori industriali.
L'azienda è certificata ISO 9001.

Name: Steiner CNC - AM Technologies AG
Description:
Seit über 75 Jahren steht unser Unternehmen für Präzision, Verlässlichkeit und Innovationskraft. Was 1945 als klassisches Handelsunternehmen für Maschinen begann, hat sich im Laufe der Jahrzehnte kontinuierlich weiterentwickelt – immer mit dem Blick auf technologische Veränderungen und die Bedürfnisse unserer Kunden.

Bis vor Kurzem waren wir unter dem Namen Steiner Werkzeugmaschinen AG bekannt. Mit dem starken Wachstum im Bereich der additiven Fertigung und der damit verbundenen Erweiterung unseres Leistungsspektrums haben wir uns entschlossen, diesen Wandel auch namentlich sichtbar zu machen. Der neue Name Steiner CNC – AM Technologies AG steht für unsere heutige Identität als modernes Schweizer Technologieunternehmen mit einem ganzheitlichen Angebot in der Fertigung – flexibel, effizient und nachhaltig.

Die Umfirmierung war ein konsequenter Schritt: Sie spiegelt nicht nur unser kontinuierliches Wachstum, sondern auch die starke Position wieder, die wir heute in zwei sich ergänzenden Bereichen einnehmen – der CNC-Technik und der additiven Fertigung.

Seit über 17 Jahren sind wir erfolgreich im Bereich 3D-Druck tätig und zählen zu den erfahrensten Anbietern in der Schweiz. Gleichzeitig bauen wir auf unsere jahrzehntelange Kompetenz im klassischen Maschinenbau und der CNC-Technologie. Diese Kombination macht uns zu einem Partner, der sowohl mit Erfahrung als auch mit Innovationsgeist überzeugt.

Description:
HOS FLEXTEK GÅR VI IND I HVERT PROJEKT MED DET SAMME MÅL: AT BIDRAGE TIL VIDEN, TEKNOLOGI OG SUPPORT UD OVER DET SÆDVANLIGE

Flextek har været en naturlig partner for metalindustrien siden 1946, da virksomheden blev grundlagt under navnet Johannes Christensen Værktøjsmaskiner. I årenes løb har samfundet og teknologien ændret sig, men vores holdning er den samme dengang som nu. Vores vigtigste opgave har altid været at øge vores kunders produktivitet og rentabilitet. Det gør vi ved at kombinere høj kompetence og kreativ tænkning med den nyeste teknologi fra førende leverandører. Vi tilbyder alt fra kvalificeret uddannelse til service i verdensklasse.

RELATIONEN ER VORES STYRKE

Det gode samarbejde er en helt essentiel del af vores forretning, og relationen mellem leverandøren, vores medarbejdere og kunden er af højeste prioritet, så vi kan garantere vores kunder den mest optimale løsning. En del af vores proces er overvejelser om bearbejdningsmetode, værktøjsvalg og tidsstudier således at vores kunder får en køreklar løsning med kun ét kontaktpunkt, da der dedikeres en projektleder, som tager hånd om projektet og bliver kontakt fra salg til endelig aflevering. Derved sikres, at vores kunder får det maksimale udbytte af det indkørte produktionsudstyr.

Name: Nacanco
Description:
Nacanco was born in the 1980's as the rental division of company Ibercarretillas S.A., then the sole distributor in Spain for forklift trucks under the Italian brand FIAT - PIMESPO.
In the early 90's the company evolved and grew rapidly into a specialist in the rental of AWP's (Aerial Working Platforms) both in Spain and Italy, reaching in 2007 a total turnover of 40 million euros, with a fleet of about 4000 units, and a headcount of around 200 employees working in the organization and solely dedicated to the rental service for its customers. 
Eventually Nacanco as a brand exited the equipment rental industry and was sold to rental giant HUNE in Spain in 2007, and to LOXAM in Italy in 2017. 
Today Nacanco is the name and logo of Stefano Giusto's indipendent freelance business, still acting in the industry as a trading entity for second hand Lifting Equipment such as AWP (Aerial Working Platforms), Self-Propelled Platforms, Truck-Mounted Platforms, Spider Platforms, Telehandlers, Fork Lift Trucks, Mobile Off-road Cranes. 
Nacanco operates in the European territories in Southern Europe, focusing particularly in Countries like Spain, France, Italy.

Name: MycondInternational
Description:
The headquarters of MYCOND Limited (UK) is located in London, which is the capital of the United Kingdom. MYCOND Limited is an international company continuously working on innovative developments, remodeling, analysis and investigation of the global climate control market. The company is mainly focused on the foreign market. MYCOND produces relatively unexpensive, energy-efficient, top-quality equipment.

 

HISTORY

MYCOND has an extensive experience in the climate control market. Today, the company is committed to uniting the very best developments in HVAC equipment under a single brand name. For that purpose, MYCOND has developed a special strategy driving cooperation with top manufacturers.

MYCOND cooperates with reputable major plants throughout the world (in Europe, Asia, the USA), so that it promptly implements all the developments to high standards and produces competitive high-tech equipment.

MYCOND equipment is manufactured on the same production lines as units by the world's leading manufacturers, such as Mitsubishi Heavy (Japan), Sabiana (Italy), Hidros (Italy), LG (Korea), etc.

The company's analysis center has developed a special testing and certification system called MQM. With quality standards clearly defined, MYCOND experts check each produced unit right on the production site.

 

At present, the company structure includes the following departments:

 

Analysis (market monitoring and instant response to emerging trends)
R&D (development of new engineering solutions for climate control)
Standardization and certification (verification of product conformity with the global and regional quality standards)
Testing (the department's staff thoroughly tests the equipment being manufactured, ensuring the highest strength, performance and cost-effectiveness)
Service center (skilled technicians provide maintenance and warranty service for MYCOND units).

• Ventilation

- SAFETIS, dédié aux spécialistes des EPI
- SYNAMETAL, pour les professionnels du soudage et du travail des métaux

DPRX propose notamment : 
- Une plateforme logistique centralisée
- Une offre large ciblée par métier adaptée aux besoins spécifiques de ses différents adhérents.
- Des services personnalisés (e-commerce, marquage EPI, drop-shopping)
- Des catalogues et outils de vente sectoriels...

DPRX s’impose comme un catalyseur de croissance, de compétitivité et d’innovation pour ses adhérents et ses fournisseurs.

Name: Elora Al Arabia Trading Company
Description:
Established in 2005, Elora Al Arabia Trading Company has solidified its position as a premier provider of premium industrial tools and equipment, headquartered in Dubai. Our guiding principle, "Quality is our Confidence, Service is our Commitment," underscores our unwavering dedication to excellence.
DEWESSER has been our stellar brand, embodying a legacy of excellence and global acclaim. Alongside VERMOLENS and ROTO, they ignite innovation in tools tailored for construction, safety, and beyond, forming a triumvirate of excellence. Extending beyond Saudi Arabia, our influence reaches the Gulf countries, marking a new chapter in our narrative.
Supported by a dedicated team focused on continuous product development, we ensure that our offerings consistently meet the highest standards of quality and reliability. With our Head office in Dubai and branches in six locations across Saudi Arabia, along with one branch in Kuwait, we seamlessly cater to businesses across all GCC markets
As an LLC registered company, our competitive advantage lies in our steadfast commitment to quality. Elora Al Arabia Trading Company serves diverse industries, including construction, automotive, oil and gas, mining, and agriculture, providing efficiency, safety, and reliability across all segments. Our major products are sourced from reputable manufacturers in Germany, Taiwan, Japan, Italy, Austria and India.

Name: Knoll B.V.
Description:
Knoll B.V. is a family-owned company that has been active in the agribusiness for many years. Our company was founded in 1955, and since then, we have been passionately carrying out our activities in a large region in and around our hometown of Staphorst (Ov.). We specialize in Mechanization, Garden & Park, and Baling & Wrapping.

You can find more information about our Mechanization division and our available machines on our website: www.knollbv.nl. We are proud to have been the exclusive regional dealer for Massey Ferguson for many years, and we also work with top brands such as Kuhn and Norcar.

On our website www.knoll-balers.com, you will find all the information, photos, and videos of our KNOLL Midi and MultiBalers. Today, KNOLL machines are operating in more than 40 countries. We keep you moving forward!

In our store, we offer a wide range of Garden & Park machines and tools from leading brands such as STIHL, Stiga, Honda, and Segway. Our assortment is also available in our webshop: www.knolltuinmachines.nl.

Since 2024, we have also been active with the professional robotic mower from FJ Dynamics. This robotic mower can be equipped with a Line Marker kit, allowing it to mark sports field lines as well. More information is available on our website: www.knollbv.nl.

Name: Equipment Next
Description:
Η Equipment Next εξειδικεύεται στον κλάδο των μηχανημάτων έργου, με έμφαση στα ανυψωτικά περονοφόρα μηχανήματα. Προσφέρει υπηρεσίες πώλησης, μακροχρόνιας μίσθωσης (leasing), ενοικίασης, καθώς και εξειδικευμένες λύσεις συντήρησης και επισκευής.

Η εταιρεία δραστηριοποιείται στον χώρο από το 1981, ξεκινώντας με την εμπορία και επισκευή περονοφόρων ανυψωτικών μηχανημάτων και επεκτείνοντας σταδιακά το εύρος των προιόντων της σε εξαρτήματα περονοφόρων, καλαθοφόρα, εξέδρες εργασίας, γεννήτριες και άλλα.

Το 1995, η εταιρεία επεκτάθηκε στη Βόρεια Ελλάδα με την κατασκευή ιδιόκτητης, πλήρως καθετοποιημένης εγκατάστασης στη Θεσσαλονίκη, που περιλαμβάνει έκθεση, συνεργείο, ηλεκτρολογείο, φανοποιείο, βουλκανιζατέρ και δύο κινητές μονάδες τεχνικής υποστήριξης.

Τον Φεβρουάριο του 2021, η Equipment Next εξαγόρασε τη δραστηριότητα της Autohellas SA (Όμιλος Βασιλάκη) στην Ελλάδα, συμπεριλαμβανομένων των συμβολαίων πελατών για μακροχρόνια και βραχυχρόνια μίσθωση, του στόλου μηχανημάτων και του υποστηρικτικού εξοπλισμού, επεκτείνοντας δυναμικά την παρουσία της στον τομέα της μίσθωσης.

Τον Νοέμβριο του 2021, η εταιρεία απέκτησε τον διακριτικό τίτλο «Equipment Next», αντανακλώντας το όραμα του ιδιοκτήτη, κ. Απόστολου Βουρλούμη, για το μέλλον στον κλάδο των μηχανημάτων.

Name: Renew Wash
Description:
Investissez dans l’efficacité brute du remanufacturé français.
Le secteur du lavage automobile est verrouillé par des tarifs opaques et des délais de livraison qui freinent votre croissance. Renew Wash, division stratégique d'Hexa Wash, apporte la réponse industrielle à ce système.
Sous ce label, nous ne vendons pas de l’occasion. En tant que constructeur-intégrateur, nous redonnons vie aux châssis les plus robustes du marché. Nous rachetons les structures des leaders mondiaux, les mettons à nu dans nos ateliers, et les reconstruisons intégralement pour en faire des outils de production certifiés et souverains.
UN PROCESSUS DE RECONSTRUCTION RADICAL
Chaque machine subit une transformation totale dans nos unités :
- dé-marquage : nous effaçons l'identité des anciens constructeurs.
- certification : chaque équipement reçoit sa plaque d'identification Renew Wash et sa certification CE. 
- upgrade Technologique : Nous intégrons nos composants et notre propre logique logicielle.
LA RENTABILITÉ COMME PRIORITÉ
- Trésorerie préservée : minimisez votre investissement initial. C'est l'outil idéal pour les loueurs, concessions et exploitants exigeant un ROI immédiat.
- Stock Permanent : Finie l'attente de 6 mois. Nos unités sont prêtes à l'installation en un temps record.
- Écosystème Global : Bornes, pistes haute pression, aspirateurs...votre site complet est unifié sous le label Renew Wash.
VOTRE LIBERTÉ RETROUVÉE
- Logiciels Open Source : Aucun verrou propriétaire. Vous possédez les codes d'accès de votre machine.
- Maintenance Souveraine : Vous n'êtes plus captif de contrats abusifs. Vous gérez votre outil, Hexa Wash assure les pièces.
ENGAGEMENT ÉCO-LOGIQUE
Le remanufacturé réduit massivement l'empreinte carbone de votre installation en réutilisant l'acier existant, tout en favorisant l'ingénierie française.
Renew Wash par Hexa Wash : L’intelligence industrielle pour votre rentabilité

Name: CIRCULARWOOD
Description:
Pourquoi choisir notre Palette Moulée ?

Durabilité Exceptionnelle: La palette moulée est conçue pour résister aux rigueurs des chaînes logistiques les plus exigeantes. Elle offre une durabilité exceptionnelle tout en réduisant l'impact environnemental grâce à sa fabrication éco-responsable.

 

Recyclage du Bois: En utilisant du bois recyclé dans la fabrication de nos palettes moulées, nous contribuons activement à la préservation des forêts tout en offrant un produit de qualité supérieure. Opter pour notre palette moulée, c'est choisir une solution respectueuse de l'environnement.

 

Légèreté et Maniabilité: Grâce à sa conception innovante, notre palette moulée est significativement plus légère que les palettes traditionnelles en bois ou en plastique, facilitant ainsi la manutention et le transport.

 

Polyvalence: Adaptée à une variété d'industries, la palette moulée est idéale pour le stockage et le transport de produits divers. Sa conception modulaire permet une adaptation facile à différentes tailles et formes de marchandises.

 

Réduction de l'Impact Carbone: En choisissant notre palette moulée, vous contribuez activement à la réduction de l'empreinte carbone de votre chaîne logistique. Son processus de fabrication innovant limite les émissions de gaz à effet de serre, faisant de notre palette une solution écologique et responsable.

Name: HYTORC Danmark
Description:
Hytorc er en amerikansk familieejet virksomhed, grundlagt i 1968 af John Junkers, med globalt hovedsæde i Mahwah, New Jersey. Virksomhedens produktprogram og ydelser er repræsenteret verden over, med mere end 150 afdelinger og selvstændige selskaber.
Den danske afdeling er beliggende på Sjællandsvej 3 - 5400 Bogense.

I mere end 50 år har Hytorc været verdensledende inden for udvikling af boltesystemer med innovative løsninger – altid med fokus på sikkerhed, kvalitet og service. 

Vi har stor erfaring og ekspertise som totalleverandør af hydrauliske, pneumatiske og elektriske moment- og spændingsværktøjer til både store og små projekter. 

Med globale lagre og udlejningsparker hjælper vi dig med det, du har brug for – når du har brug for det.

Vi arbejder kontinuerligt på at forbedre og udvikle nye produkter, der er driftssikre og slidstærke, som vores kunder er blevet vant til og forventer af os. I vores moderne, energieffektive faciliteter tilbyder vi både service, reparation og kalibrering af udstyr. Vi tilbyder kurser og kompetenceudvikling og har i høj grad bidraget til udviklingen af de nuværende kompetencekrav.

Gennem tæt samarbejde med flere af de største virksomheder inden for blandt andet olie, gas og vedvarende energi har vi en unik indsigt i, hvad der kræves for at opnå de ønskede resultater på den sikreste og mest effektive måde. Med vores omfattende viden om branchespecifikke udfordringer kan vi tilbyde skræddersyede løsninger, der gør arbejdet sikkert og nemt.
